From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**About The Team**
 The IT and AI Enablement function exists to make Legora itself run as well as the product we sell: secure, automated, and compounding over time. We are IT's front door at Legora: Tier 1 support across all IT domains, new-hire onboarding end-to-end, and a commitment to fixing root causes rather than just symptoms. Our work keeps every employee unblocked and every new joiner set up for day one.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Own Tier-1 IT support across the global helpdesk: tickets, SLAs, escalation paths.
* Run new-hire provisioning end-to-end and execute offboarding logistics on behalf of the End-user Devices & Facilities team.
* Pattern-spot recurring issues at Tier 1 and funnel root causes up to Tier 2.
* Be part of a team providing global 24/7 coverage, anchored in your location — off-hours support for users in other regions, and the after-hours incident escalation path.
* Administer macOS endpoints day-to-day and operate the access provisioning toolkit.


**Who You Are**
* 3+ years in helpdesk or IT support, or a demonstrable equivalent through focused project work.
* A natural problem-solver — you take a ticket from triage to resolution and dig until you find the root cause rather than treat the symptom.
* Calm and clear under pressure, especially when an outage or after-hours incident lands on your desk.
* Detailed service orientation — you genuinely care about employees being unblocked, and you're patient and clear when explaining things to non-technical colleagues.
* Curious about identity, access, and security; ambitious to grow into deeper IT or security work over time.


**Optional Experiences**
* Hands-on macOS administration at scale (MDM, configuration profiles, security baselines).
* Windows admin fundamentals (Entra-joined endpoints, Intune, Group Policy).
* Helpdesk operations — ticketing, SLAs, escalation paths, pattern-spotting at Tier 1.
* Identity and access fundamentals — access reviews and zero-trust patterns.
* Experience with Okta, Lumos, 1Password, Jamf, Apple Business Manager, and CrowdStrike.
* Experience with Neat video conferencing, Tailscale, Zoom, Meraki, and Verkada.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Service Desk Analyst
description:
We are looking for a
 **Service Desk Analyst** 
 for a full on-site position with our client in
 **Stockholm/Malmo** 
 .
 



  





**Experience Required:** 
 2–4 Years
 



 Language Skills
 


* Strong verbal and written communication skills in both
 **English** 
 and
 **Swedish**
* Excellent interpersonal and customer handling abilities



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Deliver multilingual technical assistance through phone, email, chat, and self-service platforms during business support hours.
* Resolve user issues involving desktops, laptops, software applications, Microsoft 365 services, printers, and access/connectivity concerns.
* Manage identity and access-related requests including password assistance, user onboarding, account activation, and security group updates using Active Directory and Microsoft 365.
* Record, track, and manage incidents/service requests through ticket management platforms such as ServiceNow while ensuring SLA compliance.
* Provide effective first-level troubleshooting and coordinate escalations with advanced support teams whenever necessary.
* Maintain a customer-focused approach by providing timely updates and ensuring a positive end-user experience throughout issue resolution.
* Contribute to operational meetings, shift handovers, and initiatives focused on process and service enhancements.
* Follow standard operating procedures and knowledge management practices while identifying and reporting documentation improvement opportunities.



**Desired Skills & Expertise** 



* Experience working with IT service management environments and ticketing applications.
* Good understanding of ITIL-driven support processes and end-user support operations.
* Familiarity with remote troubleshooting tools, Active Directory administration, and Microsoft 365 support activities.

title: Network Administrator
description:
Job Requirements:
 



  




1. Ensure availability to support Customer Site for 24\*7\*365 as team.
2. Ability to Identify IP Address schema, Subnets, Subnet Mask and perform basic IP Address management. Knowledge on various network elements, ports devices, Links and Technologies.
3. Should be able to understand Theoretical concepts in Network fundamentals like SNMP, TCP/IP, etc. Clear understanding of the Ticketing Tools
4. Network Routing (L2/L3) Able to configure and troubleshoot various LAN routing protocols and Inter VLAN Routing technologies Able to configure and troubleshoot routing protocols like RIP1, RIP2, EIGRP, OSPF, and BGP.
5. Contribute to L3 team in RCA and data inputs for co P1 incidents. Clear understanding of Metro Ethernet standards, Technology concepts, various elements used in the network and first level diagnostics. Able to configure and troubleshoot OSPF Network topology based on design input.
6. Should be able to perform IP Address management using Subneting / Supernetting, CIDR, VLSM. Create config templates and configure ports in L2 and L3 Switch elements. Able to perform LAN and WLAN network incident Diagnosis, Troubleshooting till resolution.
7. Good Knowledge on Cisco debug and Show commands on VLAN, STP, VTP, Trunking, ISL, 802.1q, etc.
8. Good Knowledge on IPsec & GRE Tunnel configuration and troubleshooting.
9. Good Knowledge on Wireless LAN Controller, Access point’s configuration and IEEE802.11 suite Able to do Load balancing configuration using HSRP, VRRP, GLBP techniques.
10. Clear understanding and configuration of L2 / L3 switching Good understanding of Cisco 2900-to-6500 series switches, Inter VLAN routing and Access List configurations, TACACS configuration, IOS Up gradation etc.
11. Perform basic port configuration in Switched L2 and L3 Network Basic understanding of debug and Show commands in VLAN, STP, VTP, PVST, Ether channel Theoretical understanding of Bridge, Hub, Switch, Structured Cabling, Access point etc.
12. Experience in one (or more) scripting languages: Python, Perl, Unix Shell, Windows Shell
13. Clear understanding of Ticketing Tools, able to create new tickets, modify/update tickets, Assign tickets to various queues.
14. Clear understanding of Monitoring and Management tools.
15. 8+ years of experience
16. Preferable team leading role
17. Industry standard certifications
18. ITIL certified

title: Vi söker lagerarbetare med stort IT intresse
description:
**Drivna medarbetare till lager i Bålsta – med tekniskt fokus**
 Vi söker nu fler engagerade personer till ett modernt lager i Bålsta. Här arbetar du i en verksamhet där tempo, teknik och struktur går hand i hand.
   

  

 Det här är en roll för dig som gillar att vara i gång, men också har ett intresse för system och IT. Du blir en viktig del av flödet och ser till att allt fungerar som det ska.
   

  

**Om Jobbet**
* Plock, pack och hantering av varor
* Arbeta i olika system och verktyg
* Säkerställa att flödet fungerar smidigt
* Samarbeta med teamet för att nå dagliga mål


**Arbetstider**
* Skiftarbete (dag, kväll, natt)
* Starttider: 06:00, 14:30 , 22:00 eller 02:00
* 8-timmarspass
* Helgarbete förekommer


**Vi Söker Dig Som**
* Har ett intresse för IT eller teknik
* Är driven och gillar att arbeta i tempo
* Är noggrann och ansvarstagande
* Trivs i en lagmiljö


**Vi Erbjuder**
* Heltid och deltid
* Möjlighet att utvecklas
* En arbetsplats med högt tempo och bra sammanhållning


**Om Simplex Bemanning**
 Simplex Bemanning är ett personligt bemanningsbolag som matchar drivna människor med bra arbetsplatser. Vi tror på enkelhet, snabb återkoppling och nära dialog – från första kontakt till uppföljning på plats. Vårt fokus är att du ska trivas, utvecklas och få rätt förutsättningar att prestera.

title: Chief Technology Officer - AI Start-up
description:
I’m working with a
 **fast‑growing European AI company in the e‑commerce space** 
 , backed by tier‑1 global investors. Their platform is already live at real scale, supporting some of the best‑known retail brands and handling
 **hundreds of millions of requests every month** 
 .
 



 This isn’t a short‑term or feature‑driven business. The team is focused on building something long‑lasting - a company that genuinely changes how product discovery and merchandising work in modern e‑commerce.
 



 With a new CEO having joined recently, they’re now making what’s
 **easily the most important hire of the year** 
 : a
 **CTO** 
 who will take ownership of the technology organisation and play a major role in shaping the product direction as the company scales.
 



  





**Why this role exists** 




 The technology organisation is intentionally
 **headless** 
 today - by design.
 



 The business is ready for a leader who can:
 


* Set a
 **clear, opinionated product and technical vision**
* Bring focus, pace, and accountability to execution
* Turn applied AI into
 **tangible commercial advantage** 
 for customers



 This is not a role for someone who wants to sit purely at a strategy level, and equally not for someone who only wants to code. It’s built for a
 **founder‑minded operator** 
 who thrives at the intersection of
 **product, technology, and business impact** 
 - at a pivotal inflection point.
 



  





**Role overview** 



* **~80%** 
 strategy, roadmap ownership, leadership, and execution
* **~0–20%** 
 hands‑on technical involvement where it genuinely adds leverage
* Full ownership of
 **product, engineering, and applied AI direction**
* Close partnership with the CEO and commercial leadership
* **Stockholm‑based** 
 , hybrid setup with a strong preference for regular in‑office collaboration



  





**What you’ll be responsible for** 



* Owning the
 **end‑to‑end product and technology vision**
* Auditing and evolving architecture, AI capabilities, and engineering standards
* Building a roadmap that is relentlessly focused on
 **customer value and revenue impact**
* Scaling and leading high‑performing product and engineering teams
* Acting as the bridge between:
* Advanced AI capabilities
* Real SaaS customer outcomes
* ARR, retention, and long‑term growth
* Setting the bar through decisive, hands‑on leadership when needed



  





**Who they’re looking for** 



* A
 **founder‑level mindset** 
 with strong entrepreneurial instincts
* Experience scaling
 **SaaS businesses from early stage through Series B/C**
* Deep technical credibility, particularly in SaaS architecture and systems
* Strong, well‑formed opinions on
 **how AI should actually be applied in production**
* Proven ability to build elite teams - hiring A‑players and maintaining a high bar
* Commercially fluent: understands how product and tech decisions directly affect revenue



  





 If this sounds like you and you'd like to hear more about the opportunity, please feel free to apply or message me directly!

title: IT Systems Administrator - Stockholm
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**About The Team**
 The IT and AI Enablement function exists to make Legora itself run as well as the product we sell: secure, automated, and compounding over time. We select, configure, secure, and operate the technology Legora's employees touch every day: laptops, AV, physical access, the global Meraki and Tailscale network spine, and the SaaS application portfolio. We own the device, network, and applications estate that every employee depends on, and we set the standards for how it is run across all of Legora's locations.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Run day-to-day IT operations for a Legora office or region: endpoint management, on-site support, vendor coordination, and new-site buildouts.
* Own a portfolio of SaaS systems end-to-end — lifecycle, configuration, governance, procurement input, capacity planning, integrations health.
* Be the named system owner accountable for the B/C/D plan on each in-scope asset.
* Operate the global office network and zero-trust mesh, and the cloud firewall rules and segmentation that sit alongside it.
* Partner with the Helpdesk team on Tier-2 escalations and with Information Security on identity, network, and SaaS controls.


**Who You Are**
* 5+ years of relevant experience. Project-driven, comfortable owning scope end-to-end.
* A builder — you like setting standards, automating drudgery, and making the next office buildout cleaner than the last.
* Clear judgement on trade-offs between speed, security, and cost when configuring real systems for real users.
* Comfortable working across teams and locations; you take ownership of your portfolio rather than waiting to be told what to fix.
* Ambitious about deepening your craft — you keep up with how the modern workplace stack evolves and want to be hands-on with it.


**Optional Experiences**
* macOS and Windows administration at scale (MDM, Intune, security baselines).
* Networking fundamentals — VPN, firewalls, DNS, office-network design.
* Cloud network security across AWS, Azure, and GCP; infrastructure-as-code (Pulumi or Terraform).
* DNS, BGP, and mTLS / certificate fundamentals.
* SaaS administration — IAM, SAML / SCIM, vendor management, lifecycle management.
* Experience with Okta, Microsoft Entra ID, 1Password, Lumos, Jamf, Apple Business Manager, and CrowdStrike.
* Experience with Neat video conferencing, Tailscale, Zoom, Meraki, and Verkada.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Junior UI/UX Design Intern
description:
**Company Description** 




 Pedago Labs, based in Stockholm, is the innovative studio behind Pedago, the creator of the world’s first fully accredited mobile-app-based MBA program. The company is dedicated to connecting talent with opportunities through lifelong learning and meaningful connections. At Pedago Labs, we design and develop applications aimed at empowering individuals to grow both professionally and personally. Our team thrives on innovation and is committed to making education more accessible and impactful.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 We are seeking a Junior UI/UX Designer to join our team in Stockholm for a 90-day on-site paid internship. This is a hands-on role where you'll contribute real work from day one. As part of the design team you will conceptualize and create mockups, assist in refining front-end designs, develop prototypes, ensure seamless user experiences, and grow your craft in a fast-moving environment. Our team is a mix of native English and Swedish speakers. Applications in either language are welcome.
 



  





**Qualifications** 



* Highly proficient in Figma, using it as your primary tool for visual design, prototyping, and UX work.
* Familiarity with creating mockups and wireframes.
* Ability to craft high-quality visual design elements to align with project goals.
* Strong attention to detail and a passion for creating user-friendly and visually appealing digital experiences.
* Ability to work collaboratively with a team and communicate design ideas effectively.
* An ongoing or completed education in UI/UX design or a related field, or relevant work experience.
* Proficient in English, since it's the language used in our product.



  





 Bonus skills
 


* Basic knowledge of Front-End Development to ensure design feasibility during the development process.
* Familiarity with incorporating AI tools in your workflow
* Familiarity with Adobe Creative Suite.



  





**You'll be a great fit if you're:** 



* 🔍
 **Curious and improvement-oriented.** 
  You stay on top of new tools, trends, and techniques, and you're always looking for ways to elevate the work.
* 🧭
 **Grounded in UX principles.** 
  You make user-centered visual decisions and can clearly articulate your design rationale.
* 🧩
 **Autonomous and adaptable.** 
  You can take initiative and own your work, while also operating within established guidelines and setting aside personal style when needed.
* 🤝
 **A positive, collaborative teammate.** 
  You bring creativity, clear communication, and flexible, supportive energy to the team.



  





 We care less about years of experience and more about how you think, how you communicate, and how you approach a problem. If you're passionate about design and genuinely motivated to push your work further,
 **apply through Linkedin or send your CV and portfolio to mkalicinski@pedago.com** 
 .

title: Technical Solutions Specialist
description:
About Univrses
 
  





 Univrses is a Stockholm-based 3D Computer Vision and AI company. We provide the perception and spatial awareness necessary for an increasingly autonomous world. While our roots are in the automotive sector, we have pioneered a new category: Infrastructure Intelligence. Our 3DAI™ system transforms ordinary vehicles into sophisticated mobile sensors, providing road authorities across Europe (Sweden, UK, Italy, and beyond) with real-time, actionable insights. We are shifting city management from reactive repairs to proactive, data-driven maintenance, saving costs, reducing CO2 emissions, and improving public safety.
 


 The Mission
 
 Building world-class technology is only half the battle; the other half is making sure it works in the real world. You will be the tactical "boots on the ground" and the "technical hands" that ensure our customers are successfully onboarded and our technical operations run like clockwork.
 



  




 The role
 
 As a Technical Solutions Specialist, you work within the Operations team alongside our Customer Success Manager. While the CSM manages the relationship, you own the technical implementation. You are a technical generalist who is as comfortable handling physical hardware as in a terminal window. You are a key link between customer feedback and our internal engineering teams.
 


* **Operational Ownership:** 
 Manage the end-to-end lifecycle of customer hardware, including ordering, inventory, setup, shipping, and physical installation.
* **Technical Onboarding:** 
 Lead the technical setup for new customers, ensuring accounts are configured correctly and hardware integrations are stable.
* **Technical Troubleshooting:** 
 Investigate technical issues and manage the entire issue lifecycle until the customer is satisfied.
* **Data & Insights:** 
 Use Python and SQL to pull data, create reports, and generate the statistics needed to help Customer Success and internal teams make data-driven decisions.
* **Internal Tooling:** 
 Act as the feedback loop for our dev teams to improve the internal tools used for customer handling and support workflows.



  




 Who You Are
 * **The Product Authority:** 
 You take pride in knowing a product better than anyone else. You want to be the go-to expert that colleagues and customers turn to when things get complex.
* **The Pragmatic Generalist:** 
 You enjoy the variety of the "hands-on" life. You’re as comfortable writing a script to automate a task as you are configuring hardware for a field deployment.
* **The Bridge:** 
 You have the ability to translate technical "how-to" into clear, customer-friendly "why-it-matters," ensuring everyone is on the same page.
* **The Proactive Specialist:** 
 You don’t wait for things to break. You are service-minded by nature and always looking for ways to make operations smoother and more reliable.



  




 What You BringRequired:
 * **Support & Operations Background:** 
 Professional experience in a technical support or technical operations role, with a solid understanding of both front-office customer troubleshooting and back-office system administration.
* **Product Mastery:** 
 A track record of becoming a technical expert and "super-user" of complex products, with the ability to manage configurations and administrative back-ends with ease.
* **Technical Toolkit:** 
 Practical experience using Python for data manipulation/scripting and SQL for querying databases and generating reports.
* **Hardware Execution:** 
 Hands-on experience managing physical hardware, including configuration, inventory management, and installation.
* Professional fluency in English.


 Preferred:
 * **AI Literacy:** 
 Proficiency in using AI tools to accelerate technical workflows, assist with scripting, and enhance problem-solving efficiency.
* Professional knowledge of Swedish, Italian, and/or additional European languages
* Driving license



  




 What’s in it for You?
 
 We provide the environment and the tools for you to do the best work of your career.
 


* **Responsibility** 
 : Become a true stakeholder in a small team where your work actually matters.
* **Professional Evolution** 
 : You will be working on exciting projects involving game-changing technology with an opportunity to improve the world through autonomy and intelligence
* **The "Work-Life" Blend** 
 : Enjoy flexible work hours and a culture that values output over "desk time".
* **Upsides** 
 : A secure Pension Plan and Wellness activities for up to 5 000 SEK per year paid by the company.
* **The Univrses Culture** 
 :
* *Monday Momentum* 
 : Kick off the week with team breakfast.
* *Thursday Knowledge* 
 : Weekly Lunch & Learns where internal or external speakers present interesting topics, while the company pays for and caters the lunch to keep your technical and commercial skills sharp.
* *Friday Wind-down* 
 : Celebrate the week’s wins with our Friday After Work sessions (free beer from our well-curated beer fridge!)
* *The Workspace* 
 : A bright, collaborative office in Stockholm equipped with the essentials (yes, including the mandatory startup ping-pong table).



  




 Next step
 * Interested in joining Univrses as our new Technical Solutions Specialist? Submit your application - All application material must be in English!

title: First Line support
description:
**Professional Galaxy** 
 är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion. Vi samarbetar med erfarna seniora experter och levererar strategiskt värdeskapande kompetens till några av Sveriges mest komplexa och analytiskt krävande projekt. Vårt fokus ligger alltid på hög kvalitet, professionalism och tydliga, mätbara resultat.
   

  

 Vi söker nu en
 **First Line support** 
 hos vår kund.
   

  

**Om uppdraget**
* Minst 1 års erfarenhet av arbete med IT-support eller i en Service Desk
* Erfarenhet av teknisk felsökning av både hårdvara och mjukvara, främst runt klient
* Erfarenhet av installation och konfiguration av klienter, framförallt Windows (11)
* Kunskap/erfarenhet av Windows, O365, Active Directory, Outlook & Teams samt remote-verktyg
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift
* Avslutad gymnasienivå


**Meriterande kompetens:**
* Erfarenhet av arbete i en kommunal IT-support (eller liknande organisation)
* Arbetat med att klassificera och kategorisera supportärenden i ett ärendehanteringssystem
* Teknisk utbildning inom IT
* Erfarenhet av iOS och Android, MDM


**Efterfrågat underlag:**
* CV för offererad resurs där erfarenhet framgår
* Kravmatris ifylld
* Referensuppdrag
* Timpris offererad konsult


**Sammanfattning**
**Kompetensnivå:** 
 3
   

  

**Ramavtal:** 
 avrop Addas ramavtal för IT-konsulttjänster
   

  

**Period:** 
 12 månader med start v.23, option 6 månader
   

  

**Omfattning:** 
 100%
   

  

**Placeringsort:** 
 Sollentuna kommuns lokaler
   

  

**Distans:** 
 Kan efter överenskommelse genomföras på distans
   

  

**Säkerhetsklassat uppdrag:** 
 Nej
   

  

**Krav på svenska:** 
 Ja
   

  

**Sista anbudsdag:** 
 2026-05-21
   

  

**Svar önskas:** 
 2026-05-19
   

  

 Är du rätt person för uppdraget, eller vill du rekommendera en stark kandidat? Tveka inte att kontakta oss.
   

  

 Ansök gärna redan idag, urval och intervjuer sker löpande
   

  

 Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.
   

  

 Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.

title: Database Engineer
description:
**About Justera Group**
 Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.
   

  

**About the Role:**
 We are seeking a highly skilled Database Engineer to join a dynamic team in Stockholm. This role requires a strong blend of database expertise and application development experience, with a focus on designing, optimizing, and maintaining high-performance data systems. The ideal candidate is analytical, proactive, and capable of solving complex technical challenges while collaborating across diverse teams.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Design, develop, and maintain robust and scalable database solutions
* Optimize database performance through indexing, query tuning, and efficient schema design
* Collaborate with development teams to integrate database solutions with .NET-based applications
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex database and application issues
* Ensure data integrity, security, and reliability across systems
* Analyze existing systems and recommend improvements for performance and scalability
* Participate in architectural discussions and contribute to best practices


**Requirements:**
* Strong hands-on development experience with C# and the .NET framework
* Deep expertise in relational databases, particularly SQL and PostgreSQL
* Proven experience in database design, performance tuning, and optimization
* Solid understanding of data modeling, indexing strategies, and query optimization techniques
* Demonstrated ability to diagnose and resolve complex technical issues
* Strong analytical thinking and structured problem-solving skills
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to work effectively across technical and non-technical teams
* Self-driven, proactive, and able to take full ownership of tasks and deliverables


**What We Offer:**
* A dynamic and innovative workplace driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Executive Coordinator
description:
The Role
   

  

 We are looking for a driven and service-minded Executive Coordinator to work directly with our CEO.
   

  

 This role exists to drive operational alignment across the CEO's full portfolio of companies spanning digital marketing, artist management, consumer brands and investments.
   

  

 You will report directly to the CEO and serve as his primary operational support, with day-to-day responsibility for keeping his world running at pace. The role spans both professional and personal coordination, and requires someone who can move fluidly between the two without losing focus or precision.
   

  

 This role is Stockholm based. A remote assistant handles the digital layer. You own everything on the ground and the handover between the two.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

 The list below describes the core responsibilities. In practice the role is broader and shifts week to week, what's in front of the CEO changes and the role flexes with it.
   

  

* Calendar & Time Management Own and manage the CEO's calendar across all businesses and personal commitments. You'll design the day to reflect shifting priorities, protect focus time and ensure every transition is accounted for.
* Daily Briefing Prepare and deliver a structured morning briefing before the first meeting of the day, covering the schedule, decisions required, overnight updates and approaching deadlines. This is your most critical daily output.
* Communication Triage and structure inbound communication across email, WhatsApp and Slack. Prioritize ruthlessly. Present information in a consistent format, decision first, context second, recommendation included. Never pass something on without adding value to it.
* Travel & Logistics Own all travel end to end, such as flights, hotels, ground transport, visas and packing when needed. Anticipate preferences, stay ahead of changes and ensure every trip is prepared before it starts.
* Financial Administration Handle expense reconciliation, receipts, invoices and credit cards. Ensure nothing is overdue. Know upcoming payment dates at least a week in advance and coordinate with external accounting and finance contacts.
* Personal Coordination Manage appointments, deliveries, household logistics and recurring errands. Maintain vendor relationships. Anticipate needs before they are raised.
* Operational Improvement Spot friction in how things run and fix it. Build better systems, improve handovers and take initiative without waiting to be asked.


 What You Bring
   

  

* A proactive, ownership-driven mindset. You act before issues arise and follow through without being chased.
* Experience supporting a senior leader with a high workload and multiple priorities running simultaneously.
* Experienced in using various AI tools.
* Deep attention to detail and a genuine love of structure and service.
* Strong communication skills, with confidence handling sensitive and high-stakes information.
* High discretion and sound judgment. You know what to escalate, what to handle and what to let go.
* Comfort across tools like Google Workspace, Slack and WhatsApp, with the ability to pick up new systems quickly.
* A genuine drive to support others and take pride in work that happens behind the scenes.
* Fluent in English and Swedish.

title: Data Engineer
description:
Are you looking for a role where your engineering skills create real business value? As a
 **Data Engineer** 
 in Bank Norwegian at NOBA Bank Group, you’ll help transform raw data into structured, high-quality assets. You’ll play a key role in modernizing our data landscape, adopting new technologies, and enabling the organization to innovate and grow.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Data & Analytics Engineering department brings together specialists in data infrastructure, analytics, and data management. Together we build a modern and reliable data foundation that supports decision-making across the business.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll design, develop, and maintain robust data pipelines, partner with teams across the bank, and ensure that business-critical data needs are met. This is a great opportunity to grow your expertise, collaborate broadly, and see the tangible results of your work.
   

  

 We offer a hybrid working model with two common in-office days. While we value flexibility, we also prioritize collaboration, team-building, and enjoying fikas and after-work gatherings together!
   

  

**Main Tasks**
* Design, build, and maintain efficient data pipelines for reliable acquisition, transformation, and integration.
* Develop data models that support scalable and well-structured data usage.
* Safeguard data quality, security, and compliance throughout the lifecycle.
* Collaborate closely with stakeholders such as Risk, Finance, and IT to ensure business needs are met.
* Enhance data usage and accessibility by applying modern data engineering practices.


**We Are Looking For You Who**
 Enjoys working with data engineering, solving technical challenges, and building solutions that make data both accessible and reliable.
   

  

 We believe you are proactive and detail-oriented, with a genuine curiosity for new technologies. You thrive in collaboration, approach challenges with a “can-do” mindset, and enjoy turning complex problems into practical solutions.
   

  

**For This Role, You’ll Need**
* Experience working in a similar role within Data Engineering
* An academic degree related to the data or software engineering field
* Proficiency in ETL processes and data logic, with an understanding of how data is sourced, transformed, and presented to data users.
* Proficiency with Microsoft’s cloud-based data stack (SQL, Power BI, Azure, etc.).
* Experience with Databricks.
* Strong English skills, with a good understanding of Norwegian and/or Swedish.


**It's Positive If You Have**
* Experience with additional BI and programming tools (e.g., dbt, Python).
* A background in data roles within the financial sector.
* Familiarity with Agile and Scrum methodologies.


**Our offer to you**
* Freedom with responsibility: Flexible working arrangements to suit your work style.
* Career development: Opportunities to grow and develop in your role.
* Feedback culture: A supportive environment that encourages open communication.
* Coaching leadership: Managers who guide and support your career journey.
* A caring company culture: We genuinely care about each other!


 You’ll also have the chance to work with cutting-edge data technologies and be part of shaping the future of NOBA’s data landscape.
   

  

 In addition to this, it is important to us that you recognize yourself in our values:
 **we are wholehearted, we collaborate** 
 and
 **we take the lead.**
**Have you heard of NOBAVERSE?**
 In our NOBAVERSE, we value openness, trust, and diversity. Here, you can influence your own development and have fun along the way to achieving our goals – all in a workplace that’s a little extra
 *bubbly* 
 ! ✨
   

  

 Read more about our employee value proposition on our careers page.
   

  

**Read more about how our recruitment process works in the** 
**FAQ** 
**.**
 We care for your privacy and, with reference to the GDPR, would like to ask you not to include any sensitive personal data in your application, for examples information about ethnic origin, political opinions, religious beliefs or information about your health.
   

  

**Read more about how we handle your personal data** 
**here** 
**.**
 If you have any questions or concerns about the position, please contact the responsible recruiter.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application! 🙏✨

title: Product Manager TV - Graduate
description:
**Position Summary**
 Help Us Create What Can’t Be Done
   

  

 Everything we do at Samsung is driven by an unyielding passion for excellence—and an unfaltering commitment to develop the best products and services on the market. In today’s fast-paced global economy, change is constant and innovation is critical to a company’s survival. As we have done for over 80 years, we set our sights on the future, anticipating market needs and demands so we can steer our company toward long-term success. As Graduate Product Manager TV
   

  

 you will have an integral part in ensuring we stay on top of the market and continue to enrich and simplify the consumers’ lives.
   

  

 Samsung continues to grow, and is now looking for a Graduate Product Manager
   

  

 to our TV/AV Product management and Sales innovation Team. In this role you will contirbute with advanced data analysis supporting management descisions and driving sales.
   

  

 You will get to develop your data mining and analytical skills while working with many internal- and external stakeholders.
   

  

**Role And Responsibilities**
 You will be working with:
   

  

* Internal sales and market data systems, product market trends, benchmarking competitor activities, and sales performance, product channel strategy, across different product segments and countries.
* identifying new business metrics that drive growth and impact key business decisions.


**Skills And Qualifications**
 In the role, it is important that you:
   

  

* Have a strong academic background in IT or mathematics, combined with a passion for applying these skills in professional environment.
* Are comfortable and skilled with tabular data tools (e.g. Microsoft Excel)
* Have proven experience of working with complex data and a good understanding of numbers and analytics
* Have excellent communication skills
* English is mandatory (Swedish and/or Korean are meriting)


*Do you live for data and truly enjoys working with it?*
*Are you a quick learner?*
*Are you confident in your abilities and can present your work in a persuasive and confidence-inspiring manner?*
* If so, we look forward to getting your application!


 Samsung is a dynamic company in a fast-moving industry, and there are many opportunities to grow and develop! To enjoy working with us you must be a person who appreciates tempo, change, and taking own initiatives.
   

  

**Some of our benefits include:**
* Staff Sales and discounts
* ITP pension and possibility for salary exchange program
* Insurances
* Fully equipped gym
* Parental pay top-up


 Selection and interview process is ongoing; please apply as soon as possible.
   

  

**#** 
**LifeAtSamsung**
**Samsung Fast Facts**
**#DoWhatYouCant**
 All information shared during the recruitment process will be handled with strict confidentiality, any trade secrets or proprietary details will be protected in accordance with applicable laws and company policies.
   

  

* Please visit Samsung membership to see Privacy Policy, which defaults according to your location, at: https://account.samsung.com/membership/policy/privacy. You can change Country/Language at the bottom of the page. If you are European Economic Resident, please click here: https://europe-samsung.com/ghrp/PrivacyNoticeforEU.html

title: Erfarna konsulter sökes
description:
**Ambiento växer!** 




**Är du stjärnan som får transformationer att lyckas?** 





  
 





 Är du en dedikerad problemlösare som älskar att förstå kundernas verkliga behov? Drömmer du om att hjälpa ledande bolag i Sverige och vara en drivkraft för deras framgång? Gillar du att kavla upp ärmarna och jobba tillsammans med kunder i strategiska förändringar? Då kan du vara precis den person vi letar efter för att förstärka vårt växande team som hjälper våra kunder att lyckas med sina transformationer!
 





  
 




**Ambientos affärsidé** 





 Vi är ett Stockholmsbaserat konsultbolag som specialiserat oss på att stötta våra kunder i deras större transformationer. Vi verkar i en omvärld med snabba förändringar där våra kunders perspektiv, situation och miljö är utgångspunkten i allt vi gör.
 





  
 





 Vi hjälper organisationer att genomföra komplexa förändringsinitiativ där processer, system och teknik utvecklas tillsammans, där fokus ligger på effektivitet, kvalitet och långsiktigt värde.
 





  
 





 I våra uppdrag sitter vi på kundens sida och bidrar med erfarenhet, perspektiv och genomförandekraft i deras högst prioriterade, strategiska transformationer.
 





  
 




**Vi söker nya kollegor** 





 Vi söker löpande personer med gedigen kunskap inom CRM, e-handel, supply chain och finans. Just nu har våra kunder ett extra behov av arkitekter, testledare och projektledare som kombinerar teknisk kompetens med bransch- och processförståelse.
 





  
 





 För arkitektrollerna söker vi dig som har ett tekniskt eller funktionellt djup och som idag har en roll som arkitekt inom CRM, e-handel, integration eller ERP eller dig som ser arkitektrollen som ditt nästa karriärsteg.
 





  
 





 Vi värdesätter:
 





 · Erfarenhet av större digitala transformationsprogram.
 





 · Konsultbakgrund, gärna erfarenhet från större IT- eller Managementkonsultföretag
 





 · Erfarenhet av relevanta affärsprocesser och branscher. Gärna retail, dagligvaruhandel eller industri
 





 · ERP kompetens, gärna med erfarenhet av SAP
 





 · Erfarenhet av både B2C- som B2B-tillämpningar
 





 · Starkt driv och en bra lagspelare
 





 · Erfarenhet och förmåga att ta ägarskap och leda initiativ
 





 · Nätverk och relationer inom ditt specialistområde
 





 · Högskoleexamen inom relevant område
 





 · Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift är ett krav
 





  
 





 Tror du att du passar du in på Ambiento och vill bli en del i vårt växande team, kontakta oss via
 





 · Karl Hjalmarsson karl.hjalmarsson@ambiento.se eller
 





 · Anders Grönwald anders.gronwald@ambiento.se
 





 så berättar vi mer!
 





  
 





 Med vänlig hälsning,
 





 Vännerna på Ambiento

title: Junior Creative
description:
**Who We Are**
 We are Kurppa Hosk, a creative business partner building unforgettable brands in the new age of branding and communication. From large-scale global concepts to niche, thumb-stopping posts, we craft stories that engage and resonate with our clients’ most desirable audiences.
   

  

**The opportunity**
 Are you a creative thinker with a sharp eye for culture, ideas, and execution? Do you enjoy turning insights into engaging concepts and content across different platforms? We might have the perfect role for you.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Generate fun, innovative ideas across channels, from social media to campaigns, activations, and other brand touchpoints.
* Stay on top of cultural trends and find ways to translate them into relevant communication.
* Produce engaging films, stills, and other creative assets that capture the essence of our clients.
* Contribute to concept development, from early ideas to final execution.
* Collaborate closely with creatives, strategists, and project teams to bring ideas to life.


**What We’re Looking For**
* Strong creativity and a great understanding of pop culture and communication.
* Curious and proactive, with a willingness to learn new tools and ways of working.
* Experience in content creation, design or creative projects, through work, studies or personal initiatives.
* Interest in gaming or digital communities is a plus, but not a must.
* Comfortable with Adobe Suite (Photoshop, Premiere, After Effects, etc.).


**What’s In It For You**
 We offer a place in a highly creative and collaborative team with exciting projects. Our office is located at Grev Tureplan, where we sit together with all other Eidra companies based in Stockholm.
   

  

 Eidra believes in helping people grow. Therefore, we have an ambitious self-development agenda. Every employee is assigned a coach, and peer-to-peer feedback is a part of every project. We also offer various courses for self-development and to deepen your knowledge in, for example, AI and strategy.
   

  

 Kurppa Hosk is a brand agency with 200+ employees and offices in Stockholm, Oslo, New York, Chicago and Amsterdam.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Process Engineer
description:
**ALTEN söker nu en Process Engineer!** 




  





 Vi söker dig som är passionerad av processutveckling och teknisk problemlösning inom biologisk tillverkning. Vill du arbeta med formulering, aseptisk fyllning och förpackning av avancerade bioläkemedel? Då kan detta vara din nästa utmaning som konsult på ALTEN!
 



  





**VAD ERBJUDER VI?** 



* Som konsult på ALTEN får du möjlighet att arbeta med utmanande och spännande projekt hos några av våra viktigaste kunder, med:
* Tekniska utmaningar och utvecklingsmöjligheter.
* En inspirerande gemenskap och möjlighet att bidra till en säker och hållbar framtid.
* Stöttande och coachande ledarskap.
* Möjlighet att arbeta inom life science-branschen och andra reglerade miljöer.
* En personlig utbildningsbudget för interna eller externa kurser.



  





**VAD ROLLEN INNEBÄR** 




 Som Process Engineer på ALTEN kommer du att ingå i ett team som stöttar och utvecklar formulerings-, fyllnings- och förpackningsprocesser för biologiska läkemedel. Du kommer att arbeta med teknisk support, avvikelsehantering och kontinuerliga förbättringar i en GMP-reglerad miljö. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med tillverkning, automation, kvalitet och teknik för att säkerställa stabila och effektiva processer.
 


* Stödja och förbättra formulering och aseptisk fyllning av biologiska läkemedel.
* Utreda och lösa processrelaterade problem med strukturerad felsökning och rotorsaksanalys.
* Genomföra och utvärdera förbättringsprojekt för att öka kvalitet, utbyte och kostnadseffektivitet.
* Samarbeta tvärfunktionellt med olika avdelningar för att säkerställa smidiga produktintroduktioner och drift.
* Bidra till dokumentation såsom arbetsinstruktioner, riskbedömningar och tekniska rapporter.
* Stödja eller leda valideringsaktiviteter (IQ/OQ/PQ) för ny utrustning och processer.



  





**VI SÖKER DIG SOM:** 




 Vi söker dig som är tekniskt skicklig, strukturerad och drivs av att leverera resultat. Du trivs med att arbeta både självständigt och i team och har förmågan att kommunicera tydligt med olika intressenter.
 


* Erfarenhet av formulering och/eller aseptisk fyllning av biologiska läkemedel eller liknande processer.
* GMP/cGMP i reglerad tillverkning.
* Produktionsutrustning, anläggningar och instrumentering.
* Projektarbete, samarbete och kommunikation i tvärfunktionella team.
* Språk: Flytande i svenska och engelska, både skriftligt och muntligt.
* Erfarenhet från start-up-miljöer, nya anläggningar eller produktionslinjer.
* Kunskap om validering och kvalificering (IQ/OQ/PQ).
* Erfarenhet av GMP för sterila processer och aseptiska regulatoriska krav.
* Kunskap om förpackningsoperationer och inspektionssystem, inklusive vision/kameralösningar.
* Erfarenhet av Lean Manufacturing och dokumenterade förbättringar.
* Talar svenska och engelska flytande.



  





**VARFÖR ALTEN?** 




 På ALTEN blir du en del av ett högt kvalificerat team som arbetar med några av de mest spännande projekten inom life science och teknik. Vi erbjuder en kultur där du kan växa, utmana dig själv och göra verklig skillnad i projekt som formar framtidens lösningar.
 



  





**OM ALTEN** 




 ALTEN är ett av Europas största teknik- och IT-konsultföretag med över 60 000 medarbetare i mer än 30 länder. I Sverige är vi 1 300 konsulter på 11 orter, från Malmö till Skellefteå, och stöttar världsledande företag inom Automotive, Telecom, Industry, Energy, Aerospace & Defense och Life Science.
 



  





 För tredje året i rad har ALTEN utsetts till ett av Sveriges mest attraktiva arbetsgivare av Karriärföretagen 2024.
 



  





*Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!*

title: Head of Solutions
description:
Do you thrive on turning strategy into action and creating value through innovation? At Sandvik Coromant, we're now looking for a senior leader to join us in a brand-new role at the heart of our transformation. This is your opportunity to be part of a team built on high-trust, empowerment, collaboration, bold ideas, and a shared purpose.
   

  

**Be part of something bigger**
 We don’t just lead the manufacturing industry – we’re reshaping it. As a global leader in advanced manufacturing, we're on a journey to transform how we create greater customer value – moving from product-centric to solution-driven offer development and sales.
   

  

 Our industry is changing faster than ever, and we’re committed to delivering smart, end-to-end solutions, products, and services to our customers. And we’re doing it with passionate change makers – people who challenge the status quo.
   

  

**Your mission**
 You own the offer strategy and portfolio for our solution business and make sure it delivers business results and customer value. This means setting a clear direction, building strong partnerships, and ensuring flawless execution across the organization. You lead the development of modular and scalable solution offerings that combine hardware, software, services, know-how and commercial models. You make sure they scale successfully across markets and customer segments.
   

  

 This is a role where you combine strategic thinking with operational execution, ensuring that our solutions deliver real value for customers and sustainable growth for Sandvik Coromant. You report to the Vice President of Product & Solution Management and is part of the Product and Solution Management team.
   

  

 Your work includes:
   

  

* Driving the shift from product-centric to solution-based offer and value creation, ensuring alignment across Product & Solution Management, Sales, R&D, Operations and Marketing & Communications.
* Developing and evolving our solution portfolio and new business models such as Pay Per Part while securing growth and profitability.
* Leading application development and prioritizing strategic focus areas based on industry trends and customer needs.
* Building and developing a high-performing global team focused on solutions and applications.
* Representing the solution business in internal and external forums and contributing to strategic decision-making at the highest level.


**Location & flexibility**
 The location for this position is flexible. International travel is part of the role.
   

  

**Your profile**
 You bring an extensive background of leading business transformation in industrial B2B environments, combined with a strong strategic and commercial mindset. Deep knowledge of solution selling, lifecycle management, and application development is essential, and familiarity with digital technologies, automation, and solution-based models is a strong advantage. You have a proven ability to lead global teams and manage complex stakeholder landscapes. A degree in business, engineering, or a related field is required, and an advanced degree is a plus.
   

  

 Success in this role calls for a customer-centric visionary leader who inspires trust and engagement. You communicate with impact, build strong relationships across functions and cultures, and thrive in a fast-paced, global environment. Analytical thinking, creativity, and the ability to turn vision into action are key to making a difference. You have a practical, hands-on mindset and are ready to roll up your sleeves and drive real outcomes.
   

  

**Our culture**
 Innovation is in our DNA and we’re proud to shape the future of manufacturing in close collaboration with our customers and partners. We believe in an inclusive, equal and open-minded culture, and we nurture our diversities to form a solid foundation for achieving great results. Add fair and rewarding benefits, as well as many different career opportunities in an inspiring global environment. Meet some of your future colleagues at our career page or visit our website, LinkedIn or Facebook page to get to know us further.
   

  

**Contact information**
 For further information about this position, please contact:
   

  

 Hanna Thomas, recruitment specialist, at hanna.thomas@sandvik.com
   

  

 We’ve already decided on what advertising channels and marketing campaigns we wish to use and respectfully decline any additional contacts.
   

  

**Hiring Manager**
 Annika Langéen, Vice President of Product & Solution Management
   

  

 Union contacts (Sweden):
   

  

* Thomas Lilja, Unionen, +46 (0)70-261 04 82
* Tord Engström, Akademikerföreningen, +46 (0)76 106 62 87
* Peter Olsson-Andrée, Ledarna, +46 (0)70-222 48 55


**How To Apply**
 Send your application no later than May 28, 2026. Click apply and include your resume and cover letter in English. Please note that we don’t accept applications by e-mail. Job ID: R0091884.
   

  

 We aim for an open and fair recruitment process and utilize assessment tools to safeguard objectivity. At a later stage, you may be asked to complete a personality and logic assessment as part of our recruitment process.
   

  

 To learn more about our recruitment process, please visit our career site or contact HR Services at hrservices.sweden@sandvik.com
   

  

*Sandvik Coromant is part of the global industrial engineering group Sandvik and is at the forefront of developing manufacturing tools and machining solutions, with knowledge that drives the industry standards and innovations demanded by the metalworking industry now and in the next industrial era. Collaborations with educational institutions, extensive investment in research and development and strong customer partnership ensure the development of machining technologies that change, lead and drive the future of manufacturing. Sandvik Coromant owns over 1700 patents worldwide, employs around 8000 staff and is represented in more than 150 countries.*

title: Electrical Engineer, Data Center Construction and Design
description:
Note: Google's hybrid workplace includes remote and in-office roles. By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
   

  

**In-office locations: Stockholm, Sweden.**
**Remote location(s): Sweden.** 
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in Electrical, Mechanical, Industrial, or Construction Engineering or equivalent practical experience.
* 3 years of experience in design development of electrical power distribution and data center infrastructure products.
* 3 years of experience with Electrical Engineering for construction projects in a data center colocation facility.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Experience managing vendor relationships, with an understanding of standard practices in the design and construction industry.
* Experience working with data center equipment/environments (including switchgear, generators, controls, security monitoring systems, fire safety systems), with an understanding of start up/commissioning processes.
* Experience managing construction projects within an international working environment.
* Ability to travel 15% of the time as needed.


**About the job** 
 Our thirst for technology is a part of everything we do. The Data Center Engineering team takes the physical design of our data centers into the future. Our lab mirrors a research and development department -- cutting-edge strategies are born, tested and tested again. Along with a team of great minds, you take on complex topics like how we use power or how to run state-of-the-art, environmentally-friendly facilities. You're a visionary who optimizes for efficiencies and never stops seeking improvements -- even small changes that can make a huge impact. You generate ideas, communicate recommendations to senior-level executives and drive implementation alongside facilities technicians.
   

  

 Electrical Engineering support supporting the delivery of the projects in line with the schedule, cost, quality and safety requirements.
   

  

 In this role, you will serve as the primary contact between Google, the Program Management Consultancy (PMC) and Specialist Contractors, and coordinate with PMC owners representatives. Their primary focus is to protect Google's interests by developing an understanding of the project delivery details and using their experience in the construction space and knowledge of the specific project, elevating the performance of other project stakeholders through active management.
   

  

 Behind everything our users see online is the architecture built by the Technical Infrastructure team to keep it running. From developing and maintaining our data centers to building the next generation of Google platforms, we make Google's product portfolio possible. We're proud to be our engineers' engineers and love voiding warranties by taking things apart so we can rebuild them. We keep our networks up and running, ensuring our users have the best and fastest experience possible.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Act as the lead electrical subject matter expert, providing technical leadership to resolve critical field issues and troubleshooting advanced system events.
* Support program managers and coordinate with contractors, vendors, and authorities to ensure projects are delivered safely, on schedule, and within budget.
* Provide technical leadership to the projects, support and optimise project design, scope, schedule, quality, commissioning and safety for electrical discipline. Provide feedback to the central partner teams on possible improvements.
* Drive project electrical outcomes of high complexity and scope as a key contributor, integrating feedback from multiple stakeholders, when necessary.
* Contribute to and review the quality and commissioning plans for the electrical discipline. Support electrically relevant Factory Acceptance Tests (FAT) and all off and on site commissioning.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

title: Lead Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**Job Description**

**WHAT YOU’LL DO:**



* Lead and deliver complex AI/ML initiatives involving multiple stakeholders or delivery teams, ensuring timely delivery of high quality, business critical solutions.
* Architect scalable, enterprise-level solutions by setting the technical direction and ensuring robust, future-proof designs.
* Drive technical excellence and innovation by collaborating across the organization, improving engineering practices, and adopting emerging technologies and industry trends.
* Proactively identify risks and dependencies as well as creating the alignment needed with dependent teams to deliver on committed roadmaps.
* Mentor and develop engineering talent across the organisation, fostering growth, knowledge sharing, and a strong collaborative engineering culture.
* Represent and strengthen the Machine Learning Engineering area through active participation in recruitment, onboarding, shaping engineering culture, and strategic company-wide collaborations.
* Stay up to date with industry trends to identify opportunities that enhance our engineering practices, tooling and ways of working.



**​WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH​**




 You’ll collaborate closely with machine learning engineers, data scientists, data analysts, solution architects, product teams and business stakeholders. Together you will build and evolve AI-powered products that drive innovation, efficiency, and business impact across supply chain and our demand forecasting.
   

  





 ​
   

  

**WHO YOU ARE​**




*We are looking for people with…​*



* Proven experience working with multiple programming languages, tools and frameworks relevant to modern AI/ML development.
* Strong expertise in MLOps, including automated testing, monitoring, incident prevention and proactive operational practices to ensure product stability.
* Deep understanding of system architecture, design, performance optimisation, cloud development and security principles for building robust AI/ML solutions.
* Broad competence across data engineering, software engineering and data science to enable effective cross-functional collaboration.
* Experience with modern AI assisted engineering tools and practices, and the ability to lead teams in their effective adoption.
* Ability to break down complex initiatives into clear, actionable steps, develop effective communication plans and align teams around successful execution.
* Experience identifying when and how AI/ML solutions can solve business problems and communicating technical insights to stakeholders.



*And people who have*



* Strong leadership and mentorship skills, with the ability to foster a positive, inclusive and collaborative environment.
* Ability to drive innovation and continuously improve engineering practices and ways of working.
* Excellent communication skills to engage stakeholders, support decision making and align work with strategic goals.
* The ability to navigate ambiguity and take a structured approach to problem solving and drive initiatives to meaningful outcomes.​



  

  





**WHO WE ARE​**
  

 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
   

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE ​**




 We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
   

  





 In addition to our global benefits, all our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits. Please note that they may differ between employment type and countries.
   

  





**JOIN US​**




 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.​
   

  





 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​
   

  





*\*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.​*

title: Head of Business Operations
description:
**Head of Business Operations till Tengella** 









**Om rollen** 




**Rollen som Head of Business Operations** 
 på
 **Tengella** 
 rapporterar direkt till VD och utgör en central del av bolagets ledning. En affärsdriven och operativt stark ledare sökes, med placering i Stockholm och helhetsansvar för företagskunder i Sverige. Rollen omfattar nyförsäljning, implementationer samt eftermarknad och support, och är avgörande för bolagets fortsatta tillväxt.
 



  





 Initialt krävs en hög fysisk närvaro på huvudkontoret i Gävle (3 dagar per vecka månad 1-3 och 2-3 dagar i veckan månad 4-6), varefter närvaron successivt minskar.
 



  





 Rollen innebär ledning av Customer Success-verksamheten, nära samarbete med ledningen samt stort inflytande över både affär och organisation. Uppdraget kombinerar strategiskt ansvar med ett tydligt hands-on fokus, där deltagande i nyckelaffärer och komplexa kundprojekt är en viktig del.
 



  
 



**Ansvarsområden** 




 Övergripande ansvar för:
 


* Ny- och merförsäljning mot företagskunder i Sverige
* Implementationer av nya kunder och utbildningskvalitet
* Eftermarknad och support
* Visst ansvar för utvecklingen av produkten
* Ledarskap och organisation:
* Personalansvar för två direktrapporterande avdelningschefer
* Övergripande ansvar för ett Customer Success-team om totalt fem personer
* Förvaltning och vidareutveckling av struktur, arbetssätt och en skalbar organisation



  





  Operativt ansvar:
 


* Leda och genomföra implementationer av större och strategiska kunder
* Agera projektledare i komplexa kundimplementationer
* Delta i pre-sales och hålla avancerade kundpresentationer
* Hantera avancerade kommersiella och juridiska frågeställningar



  





 Strategiskt ansvar:
 


* Driva förändringsbehov från Customer Success och nyförsäljning till produktorganisationen
* Bidra till uppbyggnaden av ett internationellt Customer Success-team
* Delta i och leda internationella implementationer



  





 Avgränsningar
 



 Rollen ansvarar inte för kunder inom offentlig verksamhet i Sverige
 



  





**Profil och erfarenhet** 




 En erfaren ledare med stark affärsförståelse och bakgrund i affärsnära roller eftersöks.
 



  





 Krav:
 


* Erfarenhet från chefsroll, gärna inom konsultbolag
* Erfarenhet av affärsnära arbete med kund, leverans och försäljning
* Stark kommersiell profil med vana av förhandlingar och avtal
* Mycket goda kunskaper i engelska samt ytterligare ett språk (gärna tyska, norska eller finska)
* Intresse för IT-system och god verksamhetsförståelse



  





 Meriterande:
 


* Erfarenhet av arbete inom verksamhetsprocesser eller affärssystem
* Erfarenhet från ledningsgrupp
* Erfarenhet av internationella projekt



  





**Personliga egenskaper** 



* Driven, ansvarsfull och affärsmässig
* Strukturerad med hög grad av ordning och reda
* Kreativ och lösningsfokuserad
* Prestigelös och samarbetsorienterad
* Tydlig och trygg ledare – ledarskapet är centralt i rollen
* Bekväm med att arbeta både strategiskt och operativt



  





**Övrigt** 



* Rollen innebär frekvent resande, både inom Sverige och internationellt
* Rollen förväntas bli mer strategisk, med större mandat och ansvar delegerat till teamet över tid



  
 



 Ansök så snart som möjligt då vi intervjuar kandidater löpande.

title: Business Integration Manager / Program Manager
description:
Senior chef för affärsintegration / programchef / Stockholm / Frilans / 6 månader
 



  





 Vi söker en erfaren Senior Business Integration Manager för att leda och koordinera nästa fas av ett större affärsintegrationsprogram. Detta är ett uppdrag med stor inverkan som fokuserar på att driva helhetsintegrationsplanering och genomförande över ett komplext organisationslandskap med betydande tvärfunktionella beroenden.
 



  





 Denna roll kräver en erfaren programledare som kan etablera struktur, skapa momentum och säkerställa kontrollerad leverans i en miljö där delar av verksamheten både integreras och separeras samtidigt.
 



  





 Huvudansvar:
 



  




* Etablera styrning, arbetssätt och en robust integrationsplan inklusive milstolpar, beroenden, kritiska vägar och leveranstider
* Leda och koordinera ett kärnprojektteam, tillsammans med ett bredare tvärfunktionellt affärsarbete som involverar högre intressenter
* Driva integrationsaktiviteter över funktioner inklusive HR, IT, ekonomi, juridik och drift, och säkerställa att sekvensering och genomförande är i linje
* Identifiera och hantera risker, beroenden, prioriteringar och flaskhalsar, implementera riskreduceringsplaner där det behövs
* Upprätthålla affärskontinuitet under övergångs- och implementeringsfaserna
* Leda kommunikations- och förändringsledningsaktiviteter för att säkerställa organisatorisk samordning och intressentengagemang
* Förbereda rapportering på ledningsnivå, beslutsloggar och styrkommittématerial för att stödja viktiga affärsbeslut
* Säkerställa effektivt samarbete med interna representativa organ/fackföreningar, inklusive planering, dokumentation och styrning



  





  





  





 Vad vi söker:
 



  




* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att leda storskaliga, komplexa transformations- eller integrationsprogram med flera arbetsflöden och högre intressenter
* Stark förmåga till programplanering, inklusive styrning, schemaläggning, rapportering och genomförandekontroll
* Erfarenhet av att leverera M&A-integrationer, avskiljningar eller stora organisatoriska förändringsprogram
* Förmåga att leda genom påverkan, bygga samordning och driva leverans utan direkt linjeledningsansvar
* Bekväm med att arbeta på styrgrupps-/verkställande intressentnivå
* Stark förståelse för organisatoriska beroenden inom HR, IT, ekonomi, juridik och drift
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i hårt reglerade, fackligt organiserade eller storskaliga miljöer är meriterande
* Flytande svenska (skriftlig och muntlig) är avgörande



  





  





 Detta är en möjlighet att spela en avgörande roll i ett strategiskt viktigt transformationsprogram, forma integrationsleveranser, hantera komplexitet och säkerställa en strukturerad övergång som möjliggör långsiktig affärsframgång.
 



  





 Detaljer:
 



  




* Stockholm, hybridarbete
* 6 månaders kontrakt - sannolikt förlängning
* Frilans
* 40 timmar per vecka
* 900 kr per timme

title: System Engineer within Kubernetes
description:
Cambio is one of the Nordics' leading suppliers in e-health with a comprehensive offering for the entire health and care chain. Our e-health solutions supports health care professionals in their daily work and offer patients safer and more easily accessible care. We are proud to be an important part of Swedish healthcare. We are growing continuously and now have about 1000 employees in several countries.
   

  

**The position**
 We are looking for a System Engineer to join our IT Operations and Infrastructure team, working primarily with our Kubernetes-based container platform. You will design, operate, and continuously improve the platform that runs our products, with responsibilities covering security, multi-tenancy, recoverability, and observability.
   

  

 Our platform is based on Red Hat OpenShift, but we place stronger emphasis on solid Kubernetes knowledge rather than prior OpenShift experience. If you are comfortable designing and operating Kubernetes platforms, you will quickly be able to learn the OpenShift-specific parts with our support.
   

  

 The role involves close collaboration with internal development and operations teams and includes responsibility for incident management and service delivery in a regulated and security-critical environment.
   

  

 We are a team of eight engineers operating the container platform as a managed service under strict security requirements and SLAs. As Cambio transitions from traditional product delivery to a managed SaaS model, the platform plays a critical role in how we scale, modernize, and operate our services. This means you will have real opportunities to influence both technical direction and ways of working.
   

  

 We place high value on team culture and believe it is fundamental to delivering sustainable results. If you care as much about how a team collaborates as what it delivers, you will fit in well with us.
   

  

**We Offer**
* Join a passionate group of experts working with modern technologies and industry best practices, where collaboration leads to real impact
* A dynamic environment full of new challenges and a broad technology stack to keep your skills sharp and your work exciting
* Technical freedom to influence the tools and technologies you work with, empowering you to craft the best solutions


**About You**
 We believe that you are passionate about solving technical challenges and have effective communication skills when cooperating across teams. You thrive in a changing environment and independently drive your own and your team's work forward.
   

  

 At Cambio, we value initiative and personal growth. Our culture is built on Trust, Care, and Together—values we believe are important to both our work and our people. It’s important to us that you recognize and identify with these values.
   

  

**Requirements** 
  

  

* Experience working with Kubernetes platforms such as Red Hat OpenShift
* Experience working with GitOps and continuous delivery
* Experience with Helm or similar deployment tooling
* Experience developing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines
* Experience in scripting, automation, and development work
* Experience of Linux, preferably Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL)
* Worked according to DevOps/DevSecOps principles
* Can communicate fluently in both spoken and written english


**It's a bonus if you**
* Experience with RBAC, network policies, or cluster hardening
* Experience with Prometheus, Grafana, or similar observability tooling
* Experience with log aggregation tools such as OpenSearch or Elasticsearch
* Experience with IT security including certificates, encryption, or firewalls
* Experience from Azure, AWS or other public or internal cloud
* Good communication skills in both written and spoken swedish


**Additional information:**
**Place of employment** 
 : Linköping or Stockholm
   

  

**Scope** 
 : Full-time, hybrid work model (three days per week in-office)
   

  

**Form of employment:** 
 Permanent employment, 6 months trial period
   

  

**Additional Information:** 
 The role involves access to sensitive information, therefore a background check will be conducted on the final candidate.
   

  

 We review applications and conduct interviews on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible via the link.
   

  

**We look forward to receiving your application!**

title: Elektronikkonstruktör -Junior
description:
**Professional Galaxy** 
 är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion. Vi samarbetar med erfarna seniora experter och levererar strategiskt värdeskapande kompetens till några av Sveriges mest komplexa och analytiskt krävande projekt. Vårt fokus ligger alltid på hög kvalitet, professionalism och tydliga, mätbara resultat.
   

  

 Vi söker nu en
 **Elektronikkonstruktör** 
 hos vår kund.
   

  

**Uppdragsbeskrivning**
 I rollen som elektronikkonstruktör arbetar du med produktutveckling i en tekniskt avancerad och innovativ miljö. Du blir en del av ett team bestående av flera elingenjörer och samarbetar tätt med andra funktioner inom en större design- och utvecklingsavdelning.
   

  

 Uppdraget är varierande och omfattar hela utvecklingskedjan – från koncept och konstruktion till test och verifiering. Arbetsuppgifterna inkluderar bland annat utveckling av automattestlösningar (ATE), konstruktion och layout av kretskort (PCB), framtagning av elscheman, test och verifiering av elektronik samt kablagedesign. Du deltar även i felsökning, förbättringsarbete och kvalitetssäkring av befintliga och nya produkter.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har breda och gedigna kunskaper inom elektronik och som trivs i en roll där du får kombinera teoretisk förståelse med praktiskt arbete. Du är tekniskt nyfiken, driven och lösningsorienterad, med förmåga att ta ansvar för dina arbetsuppgifter och driva dem framåt. Som person trivs du i en dynamisk verksamhet där tempot kan vara högt och där samarbete, flexibilitet och initiativförmåga är viktiga egenskaper.
   

  

**Övrig information**
 Placeringsort: Stockholm
   

  

 Arbetsmodell: På plats
   

  

 Uppdragsperiod: ASAP till Öppet
   

  

 Uppdragsform: Konsultuppdrag
   

  

**Sista ansökningsdag:** 
 2026-05-19
