title: System Administrator
description:
We are looking for a System Administrator to join our infrastructure team and help build, maintain, and improve a reliable, scalable, and secure platform.
  
This is a practical, engineering-focused role with direct involvement in day-to-day infrastructure operations. You will work closely with production systems, improve automation, and ensure stability and security across the environment.
  
We place strong emphasis on building consistent, standardized, and maintainable infrastructure, avoiding ad-hoc solutions and ensuring systems are reliable and scalable.
  
**This role is available in these locations:** Tallinn, Malmö, Malta or Helsinki.
  
Key responsibilities
  
Administer and maintain Linux-based infrastructure (Debian)
  
Automate infrastructure provisioning and configuration using Ansible
  
Manage and optimize databases (MariaDB, MongoDB, PostgreSQL)
  
Perform regular security patching and vulnerability remediation
  
Participate in server sizing, capacity planning, and performance tuning and security monitoring
  
Troubleshoot system, network, and application issues
  
Work with containerized workloads using Docker
  
Collaborate with other teams to improve infrastructure reliability, security and deployment processes
  
  

Skills required
  
Strong experience with Linux system administration (preferably Debian-based systems)
  
Practical experience with configuration management (Ansible)
  
Experience or familiarity with Infrastructure as Code (e.g. Terraform)
  
Experience with virtualization platforms, preferably Proxmox
  
Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g. OpenStack, Amazon Web Services)
  
Experience managing relational databases (MariaDB, PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
  
Good understanding of networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, routing, firewalls, DNS)
  
Hands-on experience with container technologies (Docker)
  
Ability to troubleshoot complex infrastructure issues independently
  
Fluency in spoken and written English is critical for success in this role
  
  

**Years of experience:** Minimum 3 years of experience
  
  

**Nice to have:**  

Experience with monitoring and observability tools such as
  
Zabbix, Prometheus, Grafana, InfluxDB, Elastic Stack
  
Experience with container orchestration using Kubernetes
  
Familiarity with CI/CD practices and tools (e.g. Jenkins, Bitbucket Pipelines)
  
Scripting or programming skills (Bash, Python, or Go)
  
Experience with ZFS (e.g. storage management, snapshots, replication)
  
  

**We will be extra excited if you have any of the following:**  

Certified Kubernetes Security Specialist (CKS)
  
Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
  
AWS Certified Solutions Architect – associate
  
  

Life at Relax
  
Are you ready to join a creative, forward-thinking team shaping the future of iGaming? At Relax, we value curiosity, diversity, and the courage to challenge limits. With 350+ colleagues across 10+ locations, we combine stability with constant evolution, driven by passion and teamwork. Relax offers an environment where you can grow, learn, and make real impact. Collaboration is central to how we work, and our success comes from the talent and dedication of our people.
  
If you’re motivated by quality, results, and meaningful connections, you’ll fit right in. No matter where you’re based, you’ll find the same supportive, respectful, and ambitious spirit that defines Relax Gaming.
  
About Relax Gaming
  
Relax Gaming Group was founded in 2010 with the goal of simplifying B2B content delivery for the modern iGaming landscape. With business simplicity and collaboration central to its ethos. Via a quick one-time integration, Relax Gaming now provides access to a roster of 4,000+ casino games to 1,000+ operator brands with a diverse range of proprietary products, including Poker, Bingo, and it's own extensive slot portfolio. High-quality aggregated content from multiple partner studios is provided through its selected Silver Bullet (commercially represented) and Powered By Relax (commercially independent) partners.

title: Capability Owner
description:
Join us in building the software platform for the next generation of commercial vehicles
  
At Coretura, we are building a next-generation Software Defined Vehicle (SDV) platform designed specifically for commercial vehicles. Our mission is to enable vehicle manufacturers and fleet operators to unlock new capabilities through software — improving performance, safety, efficiency, and lifecycle value.
  
Our platform combines operating system technology, cloud connectivity, and vehicle integration to form a complete Software Defined Vehicle Platform (SDVP) for the commercial vehicle ecosystem.
  
To support our growth, we are now looking for a Capability Owner to lead the development of one of the key capabilities in our platform.
  
  

About the role
  
As a Capability Owner, you are responsible for defining, evolving, and driving a specific technical capability within the Coretura platform, such as SWDL, In-vehicle communication or Logging.
  
You will lead the capability from concept through development and integration, ensuring it evolves in line with Coretura’s product strategy and customer needs. You will work closely with engineers, lab leads, customers, and partners to ensure the capability delivers real value and integrates smoothly into the broader platform architecture.
  
This role combines technical leadership, coordination, and product thinking, making it ideal for someone who enjoys shaping complex systems while working across teams and stakeholders.
  
  

What are some of the things you will do
  
Take end-to-end ownership of a defined capability within the Coretura SDVP.
  
  

Define its scope, roadmap, and priorities in alignment with platform strategy.
  
  

Work closely with Lab Leads and other Capability Owners to ensure alignment across technical domains.
  
  

Contribute to architectural discussions and system design.
  
  

Create alignment with engineers and contributors around shared goals and outcomes within the specific capability.
  
  

Establish effective collaboration practices such as stand-ups, planning sessions, and technical synchronization.
  
  

Act as the primary technical interface for customers and suppliers related to the capability.
  
  

Ensure requirements are understood and reflected in development priorities.
  
  

Who you are
  
You combine strong technical understanding with the ability to coordinate people and systems. You are comfortable navigating complexity and aligning stakeholders around a shared direction.
  
  

**We believe you bring:**  

Experience working with complex software systems or platforms
  
  

Strong system design and architectural understanding
  
  

Ability to lead through influence and collaborate across teams
  
  

Experience coordinating development activities and setting priorities
  
  

Understanding of system integration and dependencies
  
  

Familiarity with deployment and delivery processes
  
  

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
  
  

Experience interacting with customers, partners, or suppliers
  
  

Experience within automotive, embedded systems, distributed platforms, or SDV architectures is a strong advantage.
  
  

Why join Coretura
  
You will join a team building the software foundation for the future of commercial vehicles.
  
  

**At Coretura you will:**  

Work on deep technology problems in SDV and vehicle platforms
  
  

Influence the architecture of a new industry platform
  
  

Collaborate with experienced engineers and industry partners
  
  

Help shape how software transforms the commercial vehicle ecosystem

title: Marknadsförare
description:
**Vi söker marknadsförare**
===========================



Är du en kreativ och strukturerad person som vill jobba med marknadsföring i ett växande företag? Koppom Maskin har köpt och sålt skogsmaskiner och reservdelar i snart 60 år. Nu söker vi dig som vill arbeta med både digitala och traditionella medier för att fortsätta bygga vårt varumärke.


**Tjänsten**
------------



Som marknadsförare hos oss får du en bred och varierad roll där du arbetar både strategiskt och operativt med kommunikation och marknadsföring. Till exempel börjar du dagen med att skapa innehåll till våra sociala medier. Du växlar kanske sedan till att skapa tryckt material (exempelvis broschyrer och skyltar) till mässan vi ska delta på och avslutar dagen med att förmedla intern information.



Marknadsföringsarbete är en stor del av rollen, där du planerar, producerar och följer upp kampanjer och annonsering. Som marknadsförare arbetar du med text, budskap och tonalitet i linje med Koppom Maskins varumärke.



Du planerar, prioriterar och driver ditt arbete självständigt framåt med stor ansvarskänsla, samtidigt som du är lyhörd och prestigelös i samarbetet med andra kollegor och avdelningar. Du behöver kunna växla lätt mellan planerat arbete och mer löpande uppgifter, samt gilla ett högt tempo.


### **Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer bland annat bestå av att:**


* Skapa innehåll för Koppom Maskins sociala medieplattformar; från idé till publicering (copy, bild, video och enklare grafisk produktion)
* Marknadsföring, exempelvis annonsering och skapa kampanjer
* Uppdatera och underhålla webbplatser (WordPress och Django CMS)
* Skapa grafiskt material såsom tryckta broschyrer, skyltar och material till mässor.
* Skapa material i Adobe Creative Cloud, med fokus på InDesign, Photoshop och Illustrator
* Arbeta med att förmedla intern kommunikation i våra interna kanaler.

**Vem är du?**
--------------


### **För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du:**


* Är kreativ och flexibel
* Är nyfiken, strukturerad och har ett starkt driv att lära dig nya saker om vår verksamhet och bransch
* Är bra på att strukturera din arbetsdag och prioritera bland olika arbetsuppgifter
* Har en stark kommunikativ förmåga och kan omsätta komplex information till tydligt, målgruppsanpassat och användarfokuserat innehåll
* Gillar att arbeta både självständigt och i team.

### **Krav:**


* Du har relevant högskoleutbildning inom kommunikation, media eller marknadsföring, eller arbetslivserfarenhet som vi bedömer likvärdig.
* Arbetslivserfarenhet inom kommunikation och marknadsföring
* God digital vana och förmåga att sätta sig in i nya system
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka sig på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift
* Förmåga att skriva tydligt, korrekt och målgruppsanpassat
* B-körkort
* Pendlingsavstånd till Charlottenberg

 ### **Meriterande:**


* Kunskap inom skogsmaskinsbranschen
* Kunskap i europeiska språk, såsom exempelvis tyska, spanska, franska med mera

**Vad vi erbjuder**
-------------------


* Fast anställning på heltid, efter 6 månaders provanställning
* Fasta arbetstider, vardagar 07-16
* Årligt friskvårdsbidrag
* Förmånlig sjukvårdsförsäkring och olycksfallsförsäkring
* Nybyggda lokaler
* Möjlighet att utvecklas tillsammans med ca 50 trevliga kollegor

**Ansökan**
-----------



Ansökan skickas in via vårt formulär. Var noga med att välja rätt tjänst så vi vet vilket jobb du söker.



Vi går igenom urvalet löpande, så tveka inte att söka till oss på Koppom Maskin!


### **Har du frågor?**



Hör av dig till Thilda Eliasson



thilda@koppommaskin.com  

 073-824 84 07


### **här tjänsten något för dig?**

title: Senior Lecturer in Computer Science, Specialisation in AI for Networked Systems
description:
Sapere Aude – dare to know – is our motto. Our students and employees develop important knowledge that enrich both the individual and the community. Our academic environment is characterised by curiosity, courage and openness, with a close connection between people, professional roles, disciplines and research. Gender equality, diversity and a democratic approach form the foundation of our organisation. Located in Värmland, a scenic region with a rich cultural life, we are committed to promoting sustainable development in close collaboration with the wider community. Karlstad University has a total of approximately 1,400 employees and 18,700 students spread across two inspiring campus environments in Karlstad and Arvika. More information at: kau.se/en/work-with-us


The Department of Mathematics and Computer Science hereby invites applications for a senior lectureship in Computer Science, **Specialisation in AI for Networked Systems**.


The Computer Science subject has a staff of around 60 people. The research and education in Computer Science focus on distributed intelligent systems and communications, security and privacy, and software engineering with AI playing an important role for the research in all three areas. In autumn 2025 we launched a Bachelor's programme in AI that received record thousands of international and national applications. The department works closely with international, national, and regional partners from the academic community, public institutions and private businesses. Close collaboration between research groups and focus areas is vital to the department.


Welcome to join us as we advance the frontiers of AI. We are launching an ambitious initiative and recruiting four Senior Lecturers in AI to strengthen our research environment and inspire curious minds. Here, you will find a collegial community and an inclusive working environment that values intellectual courage and diverse perspectives. Take part in shaping knowledge that matters. We truly look forward to receiving your application!


The senior lecturer in AI for Networked Systems will be an important person for further extending the expertise in the research group on Distributed Intelligent Systems and Communications (DISCO) and the overall department.


The DISCO research areas include mobile communication systems and services, including the design of innovative solutions and protocols for resource allocation, multi-connectivity, and low-latency services; programmable networking; internet architectures and protocols; and cloud and edge computing. AI/ML is applied across all its research areas. The DISCO group coordinates or is involved in several national and EU projects related to 5G/6G services, satellite communication and IoT, including the EU Horizon 2020 projects 6G-PATH and PIONEERS-6G and national projects DRIVE and 6G-NTN-E.

### **Duties**


The position includes contributions to both teaching and research, with a focus on AI for Networked Systems. You are expected to: (a) conduct innovative research with ties to AI and networked systems, contributing to the DISCO research group as well as to the overall department in collaboration with its other research groups, and (b) expand the department's research competencies with AI expertise in relevant areas, such as AI for network management and optimization, networking for AI, and distributed AI-based systems.


You are expected to actively contribute as a lecturer for first-cycle (Bachelor) and second-cycle (Master) courses, with a focus on delivering cutting-edge AI/ML content on both general AI/ML topics and topics bridging AI and networked systems. This includes teaching courses that align with your research expertise. Lecturing in other areas in the broader computer science curriculum can also be expected. Duties also include course administration and development, as well as degree project supervision at first-cycle and second-cycle levels. The position may also include supervision of doctoral students.


Striving for research collaboration with other colleagues at the department, industry, and other academics is of paramount importance. You are expected to expand our international networks and contribute to increasing research funding at the national and international levels.


You are expected to collaborate with the wider community for mutual exchange, as well as work towards ensuring that the knowledge and expertise available at the university is of benefit to society.


To contribute to a positive work environment and further the department’s activities, you are expected to be a present and active part of the day-to-day operations and workplace community.

### **Qualification requirements**


To be eligible for the position of senior lecturer in Computer Science, applicants are required to have a doctoral degree or equivalent scientific qualifications in Computer Science or corresponding qualifications in AI, or equivalent professional qualifications deemed relevant to the nature of the position and the duties included therein. Additionally, applicants are required to have documented pedagogical skills.


Pursuant to Karlstad University’s Appointments Procedure, teachers must have the personal qualities required to perform the duties included, as well as have completed training in higher education pedagogy.


Candidates who have not completed courses in higher education pedagogy may still be hired, provided that they use the time allotted to continual professional development to complete the required courses within two years of employment, or that they apply for validation of prior experience. The position requires proficiency in English and Swedish. Candidates who are not proficient in Swedish may still be hired, provided they actively work to acquire Swedish proficiency.


Additional qualification requirements include:

* High quality and relevance in scientific production
* Ability to collaborate with the surrounding society and disseminate information about activities and results
* Ability to initiate and develop research or activities within the relevant subject area
* Demonstrated ability to plan, conduct, develop and evaluate teaching, examination and other pedagogical activities at different levels and using varied teaching methods


For accurate requirements and assessment criteria, see the Appointments Procedure from February 17, 2026 (swe) here: Vacancies | Karlstad University

### **Assessment criteria**


Special weight will be given to:

* Recent research involving networked systems and AI, such as AI for network management and optimization, networking for AI, and distributed AI-based systems.
* Documented experience in teaching and course development at first and second-cycle levels related to AI and AI for networked systems.
* Documented experience collaborating with academic and industrial partners on research projects and other initiatives.
* How well the applicant can contribute to and complement ongoing research and development in AI for networked systems within the DISCO group.
* Personal qualities such as the ability to cooperate, sound judgement, sense of responsibility and a positive attitude towards colleagues and students.


Considerable weight will be given to:

* International work experience or experience from national and international networks.
* Current experience in collaborating with the wider community, as well as communicating research findings and results of development work.
* Potential and desire to collaboratively drive future development of education and research.
* How well the applicant can be expected to contribute new knowledge and experience to the department.


Valuable qualification is:

* Education and experience in supervising doctoral students.

### **Terms**


This is a tenured/permanent full-time position. Start date as agreed upon by both parties. A probationary period may be applied.

### **Application**


Submit the application via the University’s web-based recruitment tool, Varbi. For advice on how to draft your application, refer to “What should be included with my application?” Applicants are responsible for submitting a complete application in accordance with the advertisement, for providing translations of any documents written in a language other than Swedish, Norwegian, Danish or English, and for ensuring that the documentation allows for objective and qualitative assessments. A complete application should be submitted by the application deadline. An incomplete application may jeopardise a fair assessment of qualifications.


The application should include:

* CV
* cover letter describing the applicant’s qualifications in relation to the duties of the position
* an in-depth account of teaching experience (including student evaluations if available)
* certificate to verify completed courses in higher education pedagogy or an account of equivalent skills
* an in-depth account of research experience
* an account of managerial and administrative experience
* a document with plans for future work in relation and relevance to the position
* an account of collaborations, international network experience, etc.
* a list of publications (in multi-authored publications, describe your contribution)
* an account of language skills
* copy of PhD degree certificate or documented equivalent academic expertise, or equivalent professional qualifications deemed relevant to the nature of the position and the duties included therein
* no more than 10 scientific publications and no more than 5 materials intended to convey knowledge, such as textbooks, computer programs for teaching, or popular science articles
* two references, at least one of which is a current or former supervisor/manager


Attach all the documents and publications you wish to be considered to the electronic application (do not just provide links). Name each uploaded document to clearly indicate its content.


Documents that cannot be submitted electronically, such as books or publications, should be sent in triplicate to the following address:


Karlstads universitet  

Hanna Ljungdahl
  

651 88 Karlstad  

SWEDEN

**Application deadline:** 2026-06-03

**State the reference no:** REK2026/66

**We look forward to your application!**


This translation carries no legal weight.


Karlstad University has chosen advertising channels for this recruitment and firmly declines any contact with advertising or recruitment agencies.


HR Excellence in ResearchKarlstad University received the European Commission’s HR Excellence in Research award September 2020. The award is issued to employers with a stimulating work environment and good conditions for researchers and its continuous improvement. The award also conveys the university’s commitment to fair and transparent recruitment as well as favorable professional development for researchers. Read more: kau.se/hrs4r

title: Advisory Consultant
description:
**You will**

* **Lead resilience‑focused consulting engagements across the EMEA region**, supporting customers in strengthening their security and operational resilience.
* **Act as a subject matter expert in resilience solutions** within the Security & Resilience Consulting Practice, including:
	+ Leading and managing large, complex customer engagements.
	+ Delivering technical and executive‑level resilience workshops.
	+ Interpreting, managing, and delivering against complex Statements of Work (SOWs).
* **Provide thought leadership on industry best practices**, helping customers align resilience strategies with business and regulatory requirements.
* **Maintain full lifecycle ownership of resilience solutions**, from requirements gathering and validation through solution design, implementation, and delivery.
* **Plan and execute implementations and forward‑looking resilience strategies**, including pre‑sales support, advisory consulting, design workshops, implementation, customization, integration, and customer enablement.
* **Collaborate closely with internal teams and customer stakeholders** to ensure a seamless transition from initial consultation to production and operational handover.

 **Essential Requirements**

* Excellent technical knowledge and experience across Resiliency portfolios, including:
	+ Data Protection and Backup & Recovery
	+ Business Continuity
	+ Disaster Recovery
* Strong understanding of the wider IT landscape including Network, Storage, Compute and Replication.
* Strong understanding of physical and logical isolation and their role in resilience and security.
* Strong understanding of cyber security regulations such as DORA, NIS2, and other relevant EMEA regulatory frameworks.
* Strong understanding of operating models and their application in complex organisations.
* Strong understanding of application dependency analysis within complex IT environments.
* Strong understanding of recovery automation and its role in operational resilience.
* Advanced customer communication skills, demonstrating strong stakeholder awareness and the ability to influence decisions, align priorities, and drive outcomes.
* Advanced writing skills with proven capability to develop clear, accurate, and customer‑ready process documentation.
* Understand the application of project management principles and methodologies.
* Experience in Consulting Delivery.
* 8-10+ years’ experience with the above.

 **Desirable Requirements**

* Experience in implementing or assessing physical and logical isolation across infrastructure, networks, applications, or environments.
* Good understanding of isolation concepts such as network segmentation, environment separation, and infrastructure independence.
* Good understanding of target operating model (TOM) design, including governance, processes, and capabilities.
* Experience working with or designing current‑state and target operating models.
* Experience identifying, analysing, and documenting application and system dependencies.
* Good understanding of logical and physical application dependencies across platforms and services*.*
* Experience designing and implementing automated recovery solutions for infrastructure, applications, or platforms.
* Good understanding of recovery automation techniques, including orchestration, scripting, and runbook automation.
* Good understanding of the wider IT landscape including Backup/Recovery Architectures, Active Directory and Syslog.
* Good understanding of TOGAF framework.

 **You will:**

* Perform solution design, proofs-of-concept, and pilot implementations.
* Collaborate with architects and engineers on patterns and standards.
* Develop estimates, plans, and risk mitigations for delivery.
* Create documentation and enablement materials for handoff.

**Take the first step towards your dream career**

Every Dell Technologies team member brings something unique to the table. Here’s what we are looking for with this role:


**Essential Requirements**


* 12+ years of related experience in a professional role or equivalent experience.
* Strong technical depth in relevant platforms (cloud, data, app, security).
* Experience leading delivery workstreams and guiding junior consultants.
* Excellent writing and storytelling for stakeholders.
* Ability to manage deadlines and expectations across teams.


**Desirable Requirements**


* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering/CS/IT or related; advanced degree preferred.
* Professional certifications in cloud/data/security.

**Who We Are**

We believe that each of us has the power to make an impact. That’s why we put our team members at the center of everything we do. If you’re looking for an opportunity to grow your career with some of the best minds and most advanced tech in the industry, we’re looking for you.



Dell Technologies is a unique family of businesses that helps individuals and organizations transform how they work, live and play. Join us to build a future that works for everyone because Progress Takes All of Us.  

  

Dell Technologies is committed to the principle of equal employment opportunity for all employees and to providing employees with a work environment free of discrimination and harassment. **Read the full Equal Employment Opportunity Policy**.



Visit our ***Culture Code*** page to learn more about how we work and lead.

title: Doctoral student in High-performance Computing
description:
### **Project description**

**Third-cycle subject:** Computer Science


This PhD project will develop computing techniques, with a focus on middleware for parallel applications, including quantum computing applications and/or machine learning applications, in distributed computing environments. The work will range from algorithmic development of orchestration and scheduling techniques, through design and implementation of system software and runtime systems for heterogeneous HPC platforms, to experimental evaluation on realistic workloads. The PhD student will work in an interdisciplinary environment at the interface between computer system, systems software research and computational science, with access to high-performance computing clusters, cloud platforms and quantum computers.

**Supervision:** Associate ProfessorIvy Peng is proposed to supervise the doctoral student. Decisions are made on admission

### **Admission requirements**


To be admitted to postgraduate education (Chapter 7, 39 § Swedish Higher Education Ordinance), the applicant must have basic eligibility in accordance with either of the following:

* passed a second cycle degree (for example a master's degree), or
* completed course requirements of at least 240 higher education credits, of which at least 60 second-cycle higher education credits, or
* acquired, in some other way within or outside the country, substantially equivalent knowledge
* Very good knowledge of programming and/or parallel computing.
* Strong background in computer systems.
* First research experience documented through peer-reviewed publications.


In addition to the above, there is also a mandatory requirement for English equivalent to English B/6.

### **Selection**


In order to succeed as a doctoral student at KTH you need to be goal oriented and persevering in your work. During the selection process, candidates will be assessed upon their ability to:

* independently pursue his or her work
* collaborate with others,
* have a professional approach and
* analyze and work with complex issues.


After the qualification requirements, great emphasis will be placed on personal skills.

### **Target degree: Doctoral degree**

### **Information regarding admission and employment**


Only those admitted to postgraduate education may be employed as a doctoral student. The total length of employment may not be longer than what corresponds to full-time doctoral education in four years' time. An employed doctoral student can, to a limited extent (maximum 20%), perform certain tasks within their role, e.g. training and administration. A new position as a doctoral student is for a maximum of one year, and then the employment may be renewed for a maximum of two years at a time.


As a doctoral student, you are entitled to a workplace with many employee benefits and monthly salary according to KTH’s Doctoral student salary agreement. Read more about Doctoral studies (PhD) | KTH | Sweden.

### **Union representatives**


Contact information forunion representatives.

### **Doctoral Student’s network (Students’ union on KTH Royal Institute of Technology)**


Contact information forPhD chapter.

### **To apply for the position**


Apply for the position and admission through KTH's recruitment system. It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure that the application is complete in accordance with the instructions in the advertisement.


Applications must include the following elements:

* Copies of diplomas and grades from previous university studies and certificates of fulfilled language requirements (see above). Translations into English or Swedish if the original document is not issued in one of these languages.Copies of originals must be certified.
* CV including your relevant professional experience and knowledge.
* Application letter with a brief description of why you want to pursue research studies, about what your academic interests are and how they relate to your previous studies and future goals. (Maximum 2 pages long)
* Representative publications or technical reports. For longer documents, please provide a summary (abstract) and a web link to the full text.


Applications must be received at the last closing date at midnight, CET/CEST (Central European Time/Central European Summer Time).

### **Other information**


For information about processing of personal data in the recruitment process.


It may be the case that a position at KTH is classified as a security-sensitive role in accordance with the Protective Security Act (2018:585). If this applies to the specific position, a security clearance will be conducted for the applicant in accordance with the same law with the applicant's consent. In such cases, a prerequisite for employment is that the applicant is approved following the security clearance.


We firmly decline all contact with staffing and recruitment agencies and job ad salespersons.


Disclaimer: *In case of discrepancy between the Swedish original and the English translation of the job announcement, the Swedish version takes precedence.*

  

Join us at KTHKTH shapes the future through education, research and innovation. As a leading international technical university, we play an active role in advancing the transition towards a sustainable society. At KTH, you have the opportunity to grow and develop in a creative and dynamic environment, with good working conditions and attractive benefits. Equality, diversity and equal opportunities are essential to quality and form an integral part of KTH’s core values as a university and public authority. Learn more about our benefits and what it's like to work and grow at KTH

title: Infrastrukturspecialist inom virtualisering
description:

title: Data Scientist - QuantumBlack, AI by McKinsey
description:
**Who You'll Work With**
 Driving lasting impact and building long-term capabilities with our clients is not easy work. You are the kind of person who thrives in a high performance/high reward culture - doing hard things, picking yourself up when you stumble, and having the resilience to try another way forward.
   

  

 In return for your drive, determination, and curiosity, we'll provide the resources, mentorship, and opportunities you need to become a stronger leader faster than you ever thought possible. Your colleagues—at all levels—will invest deeply in your development, just as much as they invest in delivering exceptional results for clients. Every day, you'll receive apprenticeship, coaching, and exposure that will accelerate your growth in ways you won’t find anywhere else.
   

  

 When you join us, you will have:
   

  

* Continuous learning: Our learning and apprenticeship culture, backed by structured programs, is all about helping you grow while creating an environment where feedback is clear, actionable, and focused on your development. The real magic happens when you take the input from others to heart and embrace the fast-paced learning experience, owning your journey.
* A voice that matters: From day one, we value your ideas and contributions. You’ll make a tangible impact by offering innovative ideas and practical solutions, all while upholding our unwavering commitment to ethics and integrity. We not only encourage diverse perspectives, but they are critical in driving us toward the best possible outcomes.
* Global community: With colleagues across 65+ countries and over 100 different nationalities, our firm’s diversity fuels creativity and helps us come up with the best solutions for our clients. Plus, you’ll have the opportunity to learn from exceptional colleagues with diverse backgrounds and experiences.
* World-class benefits: On top of a competitive salary (based on your location, experience, and skills), we provide a comprehensive benefits package to enable holistic well-being for you and your family.


**Your Impact**
 As a Data Scientist, you will collaborate with clients and interdisciplinary teams to develop impactful analytics solutions, optimize code, and solve real-world business problems across diverse industries.
   

  

 You’ll grow as a technologist by contributing to cutting-edge projects, R&D, and global conferences while working alongside world-class talent in a dynamic, innovative environment.
   

  

 In this role, you will partner with clients to understand their needs and develop impactful analytics solutions. You will translate business problems into analytical challenges, build models to solve them, and ensure they are evaluated with relevant metrics. You’ll also contribute to internal tools, participate in R&D projects, and have opportunities to attend and present at conferences like NIPS and ICML.
   

  

 Your work will create real-world impact. By identifying patterns in data and delivering innovative solutions, you will help clients maintain their competitive advantage and transform their day-to-day operations. Your contributions will directly influence business outcomes and drive lasting improvements across industries.
   

  

 You will be in Stockholm, and collaborate closely with data scientists, data engineers, machine learning engineers, designers, and product managers around the world working on interdisciplinary projects that use math, statistics, and machine learning to derive insights from raw data. You will help global companies transform their businesses and enhance performance across industries such as healthcare, automotive, energy, and elite sports.
   

  

 At McKinsey, you’ll thrive in an unparalleled environment for growth. You’ll develop a sought-after perspective by connecting technology and business value, tackle real-life challenges across diverse industries, and collaborate with inspiring multidisciplinary teams, gaining a holistic understanding of AI and its potential to drive transformation.
   

  

 While we advocate for using the right tech for the right task, we often leverage the following technologies: Python, PySpark, the PyData stack, SQL, Airflow, Databricks, our own open-source data pipelining framework called Kedro, Dask/RAPIDS, container technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes, cloud solutions such as AWS, GCP, and Azure, and more.
   

  

**Your Qualifications and Skills**
* Bachelors, Masters or PhD level in a discipline such as: computer science, machine learning, applied statistics, mathematics, engineering or artificial intelligence
* Professional experience in applying machine learning and data mining techniques to real problems with copious amounts of data
* Programming experience (focus on machine learning): R and/or Python (must), SPSS, SAS, Ruby, Hadoop (valued)
* Ability to prototype statistical analysis and modeling algorithms and apply these algorithms for data driven solutions to problems in new domains
* Ability to independently own and drive model development, balancing demands and deadlines
* Demonstrated aptitude for analytics
* Exceptional time management to meet your responsibilities in a complex and largely autonomous work environment
* Good presentation and communication skills, with the ability to explain complex analytical concepts to people from other fields
* Strong communication skills, both verbal and written, in English, with the ability to adjust your style to suit different perspectives and seniority levels
* Willingness to travel

title: VDI Specialist - Citrix/Horizon
description:
I denna roll får du ett övergripande ansvar för drift, vidareutveckling och modernisering av organisationens VDI-plattformar, med fokus på både Citrix Virtual Apps & Desktops och VMware Horizon (nu Omnissa Horizon).
   

  

 Arbetet sker i en komplex miljö med höga krav på säkerhet, stabilitet och prestanda hos en av Sveriges mest samhällsviktiga aktörer.
   

  

****Dina ansvarsområden****
* Ansvara för drift, utveckling och förbättring av organisationens VDI-plattformar (Citrix och Horizon/Omnissa).
* Säkerställa att plattformarna är säkra, stabila och optimerade.
* Delta i uppgraderingar, patchning och tekniska förändringsinitiativ.
* Bidra till kapacitetsplanering, livscykelhantering och strategisk utveckling av VDI.
* Samarbeta med team inom nätverk, lagring, datacenter och säkerhet.
* Fungera som teknisk specialist inom VDI och digitala arbetsplatser.


****Arbetsuppgifter****
* Drift, felsökning och underhåll av Citrix- och Horizon/Omnissa-miljöer.
* Installation, konfiguration och uppgradering av VDI-plattformar och underliggande infrastruktur.
* Publicering och optimering av applikationer och virtuella desktops.
* Prestandaanalys och kontinuerlig förbättring av användarupplevelse.
* Hantering av incidenter, problem och förändringar.
* Säkerhetskopiering, återställning samt arbete med hög tillgänglighet (HA/DR).
* Dokumentation av system, arkitektur och arbetssätt.
* Automatisering och effektivisering – gärna via scripting (t.ex. PowerShell).


****Vi söker dig som har****
* Erfarenhet av större VDI-miljöer.
* God kunskap inom Citrix Virtual Apps & Desktops och/eller VMware Horizon / Omnissa Horizon.
* Erfarenhet av accesslösningar såsom Citrix ADC (NetScaler) eller motsvarande.
* Kunskap inom profillösningar, policies och applikationsdistribution.
* Erfarenhet av VMware vSphere eller andra hypervisorer.
* Förståelse för nätverk, lagring, säkerhet och on-prem/infrastrukturmiljöer.
* Erfarenhet av applikationspaketering – meriterande.


****Personliga egenskaper****
* Trygg i din tekniska kompetens och van att arbeta självständigt.
* Strukturerad, analytisk och lösningsorienterad.
* Nyfiken på nya tekniska lösningar och arbetssätt.
* Trivs i miljöer där flera teknologier samexisterar och utvecklas parallellt.


****Varför detta uppdrag?****
* Du får en nyckelroll där du påverkar teknikval, arkitektur och framtida VDI-strategi.
* Du arbetar i en miljö med höga krav på stabilitet, säkerhet och kvalitet.
* Du blir en del av en moderniseringsresa där Citrix och Horizon/Omnissa samexisterar och utvecklas.
* Du får möjlighet att arbeta både brett och djupt inom VDI, arbetsplatstjänster och infrastruktur.


****Varför den här rollen?****
 Här erbjuds du möjlighet att arbeta långsiktigt och tekniskt djupt i en samhällsviktig organisation. Du blir en central del av ett högkompetent team som värdesätter kvalitet, innovation och samarbete – och där din kompetens verkligen gör skillnad.
   

  

 Tjänsten gäller en långsiktig anställning hos kunden.
   

  

 Är du redo för nästa utmaning? Skicka in din ansökan så återkommer vi med mer information om nästa steg.

title: Director - Workplace Technology
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
 The Role
   

  

 As our Director of Workplace Technology, you will architect and operationalise the AI-enabled infrastructure that powers Legora’s global scale. You will design and build the systems, automations, and processes that ensure we operate with precision, speed, and minimal overhead - creating an operational foundation that is robust, auditable, and built to scale seamlessly.
   

  

**Your mandate is simple:** 
 Build the most automated, AI-powered, operationally excellent organisation - empower our staff to do more with less.
   

  

 You will partner across Product, Engineering, GTM, and Legal to translate organisational complexity into elegant, scalable architectures and ensure that meaningful leverage comes from technology not people.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

 You will have direct ownership over how Legora operates and scales. The systems, automations, and processes you design will materially impact the business.
   

  

 In this role, you will operate as the end-to-end owner of our operational systems and AI-enabled workflows, responsible for:
   

  

* Leading complex, cross-functional operational initiatives across IT, Revenue Operations, Product Operations, Finance, and People
* Translating ambiguous business needs into structured requirements, implementation roadmaps, and measurable success metrics
* Designing, implementing, and owning AI-enabled systems and automations that replace manual workflows
* Building and maintaining the integrations that connect our operational stack end to end
* Identifying bottlenecks and eliminating them through tooling, automation, and smarter system design
* Establishing governance, documentation, and lifecycle standards to ensure durability and accountability
* Creating visibility through dashboards and KPI frameworks that drive disciplined decision-making
* Owning operational simplicity and leverage across the organisation


 You will define how a lean, AI-first company should operate - and ensure it actually happens.
   

  

 Who You Are
   

  

 You are an execution-focused systems builder with strong ownership and sound judgment. You don’t just improve processes - you take responsibility for making them work. You believe exceptional organisations stay lean by design - and you are ready to own the systems that make that possible.
   

  

**You Bring**
* 7–12+ years of experience in operations, systems management, solutions engineering, or process design in high-growth environments
* A proven track record of implementing software, building integrations, and automating workflows end to end
* Strong technical fluency and comfort designing scalable, event-driven architectures in the cloud
* Experience aligning technical and non-technical stakeholders around outcomes
* A structured, analytical mindset with a bias toward automation over coordination
* Comfort operating in dynamic environments where systems must be built, not inherited


 Why This Role Matters
   

  

 This is a foundational role. The systems and processes you build will determine how we scale - not by adding people, but by adding capability. You will help create an organisation where AI is embedded in every workflow, where operations run with speed and precision, and where a small, exceptional team can achieve what typically takes hundreds.
   

  

 If we succeed, it will be because we built one of the most automated, AI-native operational engines in the world - and you will have been the architect behind it.
   

  

**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: AI Systems Engineer
description:
**About Us:** 




 Founded on the grounds of innovation – iXceed Solutions is an ISO certified, leader in Talent and Digital recruitment solutions, serving Fortune 100 companies globally.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 We are looking for a highly skilled
 **AI Systems Engineer** 
 to join our growing team in Södertälje. This is a hands-on, high-impact role focused on building and operating
 **production-grade AI systems** 
 —from cloud infrastructure and data pipelines to intelligent agent-based applications.
 



 You will work at the intersection of
 **AI engineering, backend development, and cloud infrastructure** 
 , playing a key role in designing scalable, reliable, and cost-efficient AI solutions that drive real business outcomes.
 



  





**AI Systems Engineer** 




 📍
 **Location:** 
 Södertälje, Sweden
 



 💼
 **Employment Type:** 
 Contract
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design, develop, and deploy
 **production-grade backend systems** 
 using Python or TypeScript
* Build and manage
 **AI-powered applications** 
 , including LLM-based agents and workflows
* Architect and implement
 **cloud-native solutions** 
 on AWS (ECS, Fargate, S3, RDS, Cognito)
* Develop and maintain
 **Infrastructure as Code (IaC)** 
 using Terraform
* Set up and optimize
 **CI/CD pipelines** 
 using GitLab
* Design and implement
 **RAG pipelines** 
 , vector search, and enterprise data querying solutions
* Ensure AI systems are
 **accurate, performant, scalable, and cost-efficient**
* Collaborate across teams to integrate AI capabilities into business-critical systems
* Monitor, debug, and continuously improve system reliability and performance



**Required Skills & Experience** 



* Strong hands-on experience in
 **Python** 
 (mandatory) or TypeScript
* Proven expertise with
 **Docker** 
 and containerized deployments
* Solid experience with
 **AWS services** 
 : ECS, Fargate, S3, RDS, Cognito
* Experience with
 **Terraform** 
 for infrastructure automation
* Good understanding of
 **CI/CD pipelines** 
 (GitLab preferred)
* Practical knowledge of
 **LLMs, AI agents, and tool integration**
* Experience with
 **RAG architectures** 
 , vector databases, and SQL-based data access
* Strong understanding of
 **system design, scalability, and backend architecture**



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience working with
 **agent-based AI systems in production environments**
* Familiarity with
 **vector databases** 
 (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, FAISS)
* Exposure to
 **enterprise data platforms** 
 and knowledge graphs
* Understanding of
 **cost optimization strategies** 
 for AI systems



**What We Offer** 



* Opportunity to work on
 **cutting-edge AI technologies** 
 in a real-world production environment
* A collaborative and innovative engineering culture
* Exposure to
 **end-to-end AI system design** 
 , from infrastructure to intelligent agents
* Competitive compensation and benefits
* Flexible and hybrid working environment

title: Senior Product Manager - Subscriptions
description:
Spotify’s mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators.
   

  

 The Subscriptions Mission builds and evolves Spotify’s subscription products and marketplace experiences to drive sustainable user and revenue growth globally. We focus on awareness, acquisition, activation, retention, and monetization strategies that help users unlock the full value of Spotify while enabling the business to scale efficiently and responsibly.
   

  

 User Understanding sits within Subscriptions and focuses on building the intelligence layer that makes our growth efforts smarter—through decisioning, data signals, and ML models that power personalization across surfaces and lifecycle moments. You’ll work at the intersection of machine learning innovation and commercial strategy, partnering closely with ML engineers, data scientists, data platform teams, product insights, and business stakeholders to shape high-impact growth initiatives.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Define the strategy and roadmap for key subscriber growth initiatives, focusing on applying AI/ML in the right places balancing business goals, ROI and technical feasibility
* Deeply understand business metrics and user behavior, leading to well-researched hypotheses for testing and future AI/ML development
* Lead end-to-end product development from problem definition through system deployment and adoption, working across research, engineering, and business teams
* Drive experimentation programs that rigorously test ML-powered features against baselines, making data-informed decisions about when to scale AI-driven experiences
* Collaborate with engineers and data scientists on technical decisions to drive innovation and impact
* Build products at scale that impact hundreds of millions of users across diverse markets, considering localization, infrastructure constraints, and varying user contexts
* Stay current with AI and ML technology trends, looking for opportunities to match with key business objectives


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have 5+ years product management experience with proven track record launching ML/data-driven products at scale
* You have strong technical fluency in data science, recommender systems, machine learning concepts, model evaluation, A/B testing, and data pipelines. You can review and challenge technical decisions.
* You have strategic judgment about when to apply ML vs. GenAI vs. other tools and you understand the cost-benefit tradeoffs of complex systems
* You understand subscription business and e-commerce fundamentals in consumer products
* You are an excellent communicator who can collaborate cross functionally and communicate complex ideas to stakeholders at all levels


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London (UK) or Stockholm (Sweden)


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Marketing Development Representative
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**About The Role**
 We’re looking for a Marketing Development Representative (MDR) to join our growth marketing team.
   

  

 This role sits at the intersection of marketing and sales, focusing on turning marketing engagement into qualified sales opportunities.
   

  

 You will work closely with the marketing team to identify and engage prospects who interact with Legora through campaigns, events, content, and product experiences.
   

  

**Your Mission Is Simple**
 Turn marketing signals into sales opportunities.
   

  

 Unlike traditional SDR roles that focus primarily on cold outbound prospecting, this role focuses on engaging warm prospects who already know Legora.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Follow up with marketing-generated leads from campaigns, webinars, events, and website conversions
* Engage prospects who show high-intent signals such as content engagement, event participation, or product interest
* Qualify prospects and identify potential opportunities for the sales team
* Book meetings for Account Executives with relevant and interested prospects
* Work closely with the Marketing Automation Specialist to activate and prioritize engaged leads
* Collaborate with the growth marketing team to identify signals that indicate buying intent
* Provide feedback to marketing on lead quality, messaging, and campaign performance
* Maintain accurate lead information and activity tracking in the CRM
* Help ensure marketing-generated demand is engaged quickly and effectively


**What Success Looks Like**
* Marketing leads are followed up within 24 hours
* High-intent prospects are converted into qualified meetings
* Marketing campaigns generate consistent pipeline
* Strong collaboration between marketing and sales


**What We’re Looking For**
* 1–3 years of experience in sales development, business development, marketing, or customer-facing roles
* Strong communication and relationship-building skills
* Energetic, curious, and proactive
* Comfortable speaking with senior professionals
* Highly organized and able to manage multiple leads and conversations
* Interested in working at the intersection of marketing, sales, and growth
* Excited about working in a fast-moving startup environment


**Bonus if you have**
* Experience working with HubSpot or Salesforce
* Experience engaging leads from events, webinars, or campaigns
* Background in SaaS, legal tech, or AI products


**Why this role is unique**
 Most SDR roles focus on cold outbound prospecting.
   

  

 This role focuses on engaging prospects who have already interacted with Legora and converting that engagement into meaningful sales conversations.
   

  

 You will play a key role in ensuring that marketing demand turns into real pipeline and revenue.
   

  

**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Delivery Consultant - Cloud Architect, Professional Services
description:
**Description**
 The Amazon Web Services Professional Services (ProServe) team is seeking a skilled Delivery Consultant to join our team at Amazon Web Services (AWS). In this role, you'll work closely with customers to design, implement, and manage AWS solutions that meet their technical requirements and business objectives. You'll be a key player in driving customer success through their cloud journey, providing technical expertise and best practices throughout the project lifecycle.
   

  

 Possessing a deep understanding of AWS products and services, as a Delivery Consultant you will be proficient in architecting complex, scalable, and secure solutions tailored to meet the specific needs of each customer. You’ll work closely with stakeholders to gather requirements, assess current infrastructure, and propose effective migration strategies to AWS. As trusted advisors to our customers, providing guidance on industry trends, emerging technologies, and innovative solutions, you will be responsible for leading the implementation process, ensuring adherence to best practices, optimizing performance, and managing risks throughout the project.
   

  

* This role requires you to be a Swedish National and have business level proficiency in the Swedish language


 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 As an experienced technology professional, you will be responsible for:
   

  

* Designing and implementing complex, scalable, and secure AWS solutions tailored to customer needs
* Providing technical guidance and troubleshooting support throughout project delivery
* Collaborating with stakeholders to gather requirements and propose effective migration strategies
* Acting as a trusted advisor to customers on industry trends and emerging technologies
* Sharing knowledge within the organization through mentoring, training, and creating reusable artifacts


 A day in the life
   

  

 The AWS Professional Services organization is a global team of experts that help customers realize their desired business outcomes when using the AWS Cloud. We work together with customer teams and the AWS Partner Network (APN) to execute enterprise cloud computing initiatives. Our team provides assistance through a collection of offerings which help customers achieve specific outcomes related to enterprise cloud adoption. We also deliver focused guidance through our global specialty practices, which cover a variety of solutions, technologies, and industries.
   

  

**About The Team**
 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Experience in cloud architecture and implementation
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, related field, or equivalent experience
* Hands-on experience leading the design, development and deployment of enterprise solution and deep technical expertise and consulting acumen to effectively guide customers through their AWS cloud transformation journey.
* Current hands-on technology infrastructure, network, compute, storage, and virtualization experience
* Customer facing skills to represent AWS well and drive discussions with senior personnel regarding trade-offs, best practices, project management and risk mitigation


**Preferred Qualifications**
* AWS experience preferred, with proficiency in a wide range of AWS services (e.g., EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, IAM, VPC, CloudFormation)
* AWS Professional level certifications (e.g., Solutions Architect Professional, DevOps Engineer Professional) preferred
* Experience with automation and scripting (e.g., Terraform, Python)
* Knowledge of security and compliance standards (e.g., HIPAA, GDPR)
* Strong communication skills with the ability to explain technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences
* Experience with software development life cycle (SDLC) and agile/iterative methodologies
* Presentation Competency for leading technical workshops and customer presentations


 Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.
   

  

 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 - AWS EMEA SARL (Sweden Branch) - G54
   

  

 Job ID: A10392567

 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done.  Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.

title: Datacenter Network Engineer
description:
*Teracom är statens bolag för säker kommunikation. Deras uppdrag är enkelt, men livsviktigt. Teracom ser till att informationen når fram, oavsett om det råder solsken, storm eller kris. Från klassisk radio och tv till framtidens digitala nät, bygger de lösningar som ska tåla allt från cyberhot till naturkatastrofer. Teracom består av 450 kollegor utspridda på 50 orter, som alla jobbar för ett tryggare och mer motståndskraftigt Sverige. Vill du vara med och säkra landets viktigaste infrastruktur?* 




  





 Nu söker Teracom en Network Engineer inom datacentervätverk och cloud. De letar efter dig som vill arbeta hands-on i en samhällsviktig verksamhet med höga krav på nätverkssäkerhet och stabil drift.
 



  





 Som Network Engineer arbetar du med att förvalta, vidareutveckla och säkra Teracoms datacenternätverk och nätverksinfrastruktur. En av dina närmaste arbetspartners kommer vara serverteamet, som också prioriterar de behov som finns. På sikt kommer ditt dagliga arbete även involvera förändringsarbete kopplat till modernisering och utveckling av infrastrukturen.
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter innefattar bland annat att...** 



* Hantera daglig ärendehantering i Jira samt incident- och changehantering.
* Ansvara för förvaltning, projekt och tjänsteägande av våra datacenter.
* Utföra enklare design, implementering och vidareutveckling av datacenterlösningar.
* Samverka löpande med serverteamet, IT-drift, säkerhetsteamet och externa leverantörer.



  





**Vem är du?** 




 Du är en do:er som trivs med att lösa dagliga problem och hålla infrastrukturen rullande. Du är analytisk, strukturerad och förstår vikten av säkerhet i det du bygger. Du är tydlig i din kommunikation och har lätt för att samarbeta tvärfunktionellt.
 



  





**Kvalifikationer** 



* Minst 2 års erfarenhet av drift och förvaltning av datacenternätverk i komplexa miljöer.
* Flerårig erfarenhet inom övervakning och brandväggar (som Palo Alto, ASA, Firepower eller motsvarande)
* Kunskap inom routing/switching (exempelvis BGP, OSPF, VLAN, EVPN eller motsvarande).
* Erfarenhet av nätverkssäkerhet i multi-tenant-miljöer.



  





 Det är starkt meriterande om du har kunskap inom Cisco ACI. Teracom ser det även som ett plus om du har erfarenhet av Cloud Networking, automatisering eller innehar en CCNP Enterprise-certifiering.
 



  





**Då anställningen är placerad i säkerhetsklass krävs:** 



* Godkänd registerkontroll, säkerhetsprövning och bakgrundskontroll
* Godkänt alkohol- och drogtest
* Svenskt medborgarskap



  





**Teracom erbjuder** 




 Hos Teracom Samhällsnät får du vara med och bidra till att våra samhällsviktiga tjänster fungerar dygnet runt, året runt. De erbjuder en arbetsplats med stort engagemang, ansvarstagande och kompetenta kollegor.
 



  





 Teracom värnar om en kultur som främjar lärande, utveckling, trivsel och balans mellan arbete och fritid. Tjänsten är placerad på vårt huvudkontor på Kungsholmen i Stockholm.
 



  





**Om du inte redan känner Teracom** 




 Teracom är statens bolag för säker kommunikation. I våra nät når informationen fram opåverkad. Vår styrka ligger i att alltid vara redo, i hela landet, alla dagar, dygnet runt. Med ständig beredskap ska vår infrastruktur för kommunikation stå emot allt från naturkatastrofer till cyberhot och krig. De hjälper våra kunder med säkra och skalbara lösningar, från traditionell radio- och tv-utsändning till framtidens digitala kommunikationsvägar. Våra kunder är inom privata och offentliga aktörer. Vårt uppdrag är avgörande för att samhället ska vara tryggt och motståndskraftigt. Teracom är ett bolag med ca 450 medarbetare och finns på 50 orter över hela Sverige

title: Category manager - Graduate
description:
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise offers recent graduates the opportunity to join a global tech leader and gain invaluable experience through our graduate roles. You’ll step into a highly dynamic, fast-paced environment where code, data, and business strategy intersect, and where your ideas can ship to customers in real time.
   

  

 As a
 **Category Manager graduate** 
 , you will apply your technical and business know-how to live projects, build new skills alongside industry professionals, and shape the future of AI-ready compute solutions. Throughout the program, you’ll receive regular training, one-to-one mentoring, and clear development goals, all in an open, collaborative culture that welcomes questions and celebrates innovation.
   

  

**Start Date:** 
 September 2026
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Research market trends in AI, edge, and cloud and translate insights into product opportunities.
* Model business objectives, TAM sizing, and price elasticity to keep offerings competitive and profitable.
* Deep dive into product specs, benchmarks, and cost structures to recommend feature roadmaps.
* Communicate product plans and technical battle-cards to direct and channel sales teams.
* Co-create demand-generation campaigns with Marketing, analyzing CAC and funnel conversion.
* Support virtual and in-person sales initiatives, demos, and customer workshops.


**What You’ll Need**
* Recently completed/graduated (graduation within the last 12 months) from a Bachelor’s or Master’s in computer science, Artificial Intelligence, Data/Business Analytics, Engineering, Economics, or Marketing.
* Curiosity about the tech sector plus a basic grasp of Python/SQL, spreadsheets, and presentation tools.
* Native Swedish & strong written and spoken English to explain complex ideas to technical and non-technical stakeholders.
* Analytical mindset, eagerness to learn modern product-management and go-to-market frameworks.


**What We’d Prefer You Bring**
* Eagerness to Learn – a passion for digging into new ML models, pricing strategies, or customer journeys.
* Collaborative Spirit – comfort brainstorming with engineers, marketers, and finance analysts to hit shared goals.
* Openness to Fresh Perspectives – ability to pivot when data or market dynamics change.
* Leadership Mindset – prior roles in hackathons, student clubs, or community projects.
* Hybrid Work Readiness – proven time-management skills across virtual and on-site settings.
* Clear Communication – confidence to present findings, ask incisive questions, and give constructive feedback.


**Bonus Skills (Nice To Have)**
* Experience with basic marketing analytics or A/B testing.
* Familiarity with sales operations or CRM tools.
* Hands-on use of product-management, BI, or project-tracking software (Jira, Power BI, Tableau, etc.).


**What You Can Expect From Us**
* Extensive onboarding to ramp up on HPE’s compute & AI portfolio.
* Ongoing learning pathways-technical deep dives, business bootcamps, and soft-skill workshops.
* Dedicated senior mentor; clear performance milestones and stretch projects.
* Work-life balance with hybrid flexibility and Wellness Fridays.


**Want to learn more about Presales and Sales careers at HPE?**
**Role**
 Try our new virtual experience program, where you can explore what’s next for you in this role and earn shareable completion certificates that stand out to HPE recruiters and hiring managers :
   

  

 https://careers.hpe.com/us/en/students-virtual-experiences
   

  

 #Sweden #HPEcareers
   

  

**Additional Skills**
 Accountability, Accountability, Action Planning, Active Learning, Active Listening, Bias, Business, Calendar Management, Coaching, Computer Literacy, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Design Thinking, Empathy, Follow-Through, Group Problem Solving, Growth Mindset, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity, Office Administration, Policy and procedures, Recordkeeping, Risk Assessment, Software Development {+ 5 more}
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
**Health & Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal & Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
   

  

 #sweden
   

  

 #grads
   

  

**Job**
 Administration
   

  

**Job Level**
 Entry
   

  

 HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.
   

  

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**
 HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.
   

  

**No Fees Notice & Recruitment Fraud Disclaimer**
